items.title: Hotfix - 1.3.2.1.135487
items.contents: [p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p align="start"]Hot on the heels of the [b][url="https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/513710/view/698770449667981410"]July Update[/url][/b], we’re releasing a hotfix for the most pressing issues you’ve encountered out in the wild. You can view the full list of resolved issues and adjustments below.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/baeea3d2d67fd5e6e4628afe0f6f059b2b46dc20.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3][b]PERFORMANCE & CRASHES[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a server crash that could occur if a client closed the game immediately after initiating a connection.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a client crash that could occur when another player took the last bite of food.[/p][/*][*][p]Made changes to address client crashes when driving vehicles at high speed.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]VEHICLES[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where locks would disappear after being removed from a vehicle.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players would be unable to operate the Dinghy at certain locations.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where vehicles could be accessed through base building floors from adjacent levels.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]WEAPONS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Blackline Compound Bow string sight would be misaligned with the front sight.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the camera would clip through the VHS2 while firing in ADS mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the character’s finger would clip through the Hunter Recurve Bow.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Apex Predator Ivory Hunter 85 was unavailable on servers with mines and traps disabled.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where aiming with the Ripper Bow would be offset.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where an incorrect grip was applied to the Hunter Recurve Bow.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]QUESTS, HUNTING & ANIMALS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where kill quests would not be completed if the target was initially damaged using an incorrect weapon type.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players would be unable to adjust the zoom on the Hunter Monocular.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Bait Feeder could be moved by crouching and clipping through it.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Deer Skull Trophy crafting recipe incorrectly required a Doe Head.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]ITEMS & INVENTORY[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where loot could not be moved from a Cargo Drop into the player’s inventory.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Tracksuit Top would take up more inventory space than the Tactical Sweater.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where spawning a Camouflage Jacket would instead spawn a black and orange variant with collision issues.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Hunting Quiver’s description did not identify it as a quest reward.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Duck Target and Stone Arrowhead charms would have incorrect prices and Fame Point requirements.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]USER INTERFACE[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where the ‘Welcome to the Island’ survival tip would ask the player to open the ‘Tasks’ tab, which is now called ‘Tutorials’.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the survival tip for Hunting tutorials contained minor wording errors.[/p][/*][/list][p]As always, if you've encountered anything else that requires our attention, please let us know via the following channels:[/p][list][*][p][b][url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/?snr=1_2108_9__2107"]Bug reports forum on Steam[/url][/b][/p][/*][*][p][b][url="https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.scum.game%2F"]Official SCUM support[/url][/b][/p][/*][/list]

items.title: SCUM: INTO THE WILD - July Update | 1.3.2.0.134527
items.contents:
[p][b]Hey Prisoners,[/b][/p][p][b]The July Into the Wild update is now live![/b][/p][p]This month introduces a completely new tutorial experience inside the TEC1 Conditioning Facility, mutant deer, boar and wolves, and the Master Hunter, who arrives with new tiers of tougher quests and exclusive rewards. [/p][p]The update also includes reworked Island tutorials, animal behaviour improvements, official servers supporting up to 80 players, new quality-of-life features, fixes, balancing, and more changes based on player feedback.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/fe3d5d85f2a09540e9ea2fbf122de7c962dc32f7.png"][/img][/p][h3][b]
INTO THE WILD CONTINUES[/b][/h3][p]Before we get into everything included in the July update, we want to remind you that Into the Wild is continuing beyond its original three-month plan.[/p][p]When we first announced the season, we said it would run from May to July. Since then, it has grown beyond that original schedule, so Into the Wild will now continue through [b]August and September[/b]. That gives the team more development time and gives each update a little more room.[/p][p]Across the next two updates, we’ll continue building on hunting, cooking, food systems and fishing, with new challenges and further improvements still to come.[/p][p][b]With that covered, here’s everything included in the July update.[/b]

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/348ed3926dd3310a6eba91d5703d88bcb4a6c19f.png"][/img][b] [/b][/p][previewyoutube="VYCvU490Jd8;full"][/previewyoutube][h3][b]THE TEC1 CONDITIONING FACILITY [/b][/h3][p][b]THE CAMERAS ARE LIVE. GIVE THEM SOMETHING WORTH WATCHING.[/b][/p][p]The TEC1 Conditioning Facility is a purpose-built training complex designed to prepare you for the survival show waiting on the Island.[/p][p]SCUM throws a lot at you from the moment you arrive. The Conditioning Facility gives prisoners somewhere to learn the essentials before the pressure is on, so those opening hours on the Island can be spent surviving rather than working out how everything functions.[/p][p]You’ll be taken through a series of practical exercises covering the skills you’ll need once you reach the Island. Get to grips with movement and stealth, craft essential tools and weapons, face your first puppet, treat your injuries, and prove you can handle yourself in combat.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/02e6ae67d4b4c9ba2afe0514bd9360ac8656ab90.gif"][/img][/p][p]Complete each stage of the conditioning program, repeat anything you need, and prove you’re ready for the next test.[/p][p]The new tutorial also brings changes to the wider onboarding experience. The previous intro cinematic has been removed, while Deena has a new voice and all-new dialogue throughout TEC1. Her Island tutorial dialogue has also been rewritten to match the style introduced in the facility.[/p][p][b]HOW TO ENTER THE FACILITY:[/b] Select [b]TUTORIAL[/b] from the main menu. The Conditioning Facility is a standalone tutorial experience, separate from Single Player and Multiplayer, and does not begin automatically when creating a prisoner.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ef2cc45bbd6a9489a4eebc6e5134bf48b04f8cc5.png"][/img][/p][h3][b]ISLAND TUTORIALS[/b][/h3][p]The tutorial system on the Island has also been updated, giving you more control over what you learn and when.[/p][p]Open the Tutorials tab and choose from Survival, Crafting, Metabolism, Economy, Base Building, and Hunting. There’s no fixed sequence, so you can tackle what you need, when you need it.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/18b6a30d1a8b77361c673a6b8ee4bbcf1c20fb4e.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Objectives are more flexible too. Instead of expecting every action to happen in a specific order, tutorials now focus on the result. Already completed a step or acquired a required item in another way? The tutorial can recognize that progress and move on.[/p][p]Improved tracking and highlighting make relevant items and locations easier to identify, while any tutorial can be abandoned and restarted later without losing access to it.[/p][p]With tutorials now selected manually, the old character creation prompt asking whether they should begin automatically has also been removed.[/p][h2][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0ec961085e7876709aef3f970889b3bc83d7338c.png"][/img][/h2][p]Mutant deer, boar and wolves are now appearing in specific locations across the Island. They’re tougher than their regular counterparts, and sit at the center of the new Master Hunter quest lines.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a557b4b61b45be68b7bc3c55f50de8f1417a490e.gif"][/img][/p][p]Deep inside the Hunter’s Grotto, the Master Hunter waits, dressed in the trophies of a lifetime spent killing things that fought back.[/p][p]He has no time for unproven prisoners. Complete one quest for the Hunter first to unlock the Master Hunter’s Quest Book and gain access to three increasingly dangerous tiers of hunting challenges.[/p][h3][b]THREE TIERS OF THE HUNT[/b][/h3][p]The Master Hunter offers three tiers of increasingly demanding quests, with each featuring a different mutant animal:[/p][list][*][p][b]TIER 1 sends you after mutant deer[/b][/p][/*][*][p][b]TIER 2 raises the stakes with mutant boars[/b][/p][/*][*][p][b]TIER 3 puts you on the trail of mutant wolves[/b][/p][/*][/list][p]Beyond the mutant hunts, you’ll face a variety of objectives with different conditions. You may be asked to use a particular weapon or return with intact hides, meat, antlers and heads.[/p][p]The condition of what you bring back matters, so a careless kill could leave you without what the Master Hunter needs.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ac145e5b40e7d87941060825ed046dc1a86413a9.png"][/img][/p][h3][b]REWARDS WORTH THE HUNT[/b][/h3][p]The Master Hunter’s quest lines offer the biggest collection of earnable quest rewards we’ve added to SCUM so far.[/p][p]Where earlier quests largely rewarded Fame, cash and trade deals, these new quest lines allow you to earn exclusive weapons, hunting gear, animal charms, base-building recipes and even pieces of the Master Hunter’s own outfit.[/p][list][*][p][b]TIER 1 rewards include[/b] the Hunter’s Recurve Bow, Hunting Quiver, Ridgeline Bait Feeder, Deer Skull Charm, Deer Skull Trophy and Master Hunter Trousers.[/p][/*][*][p][b]TIER 2 rewards include[/b] the Hunter Blackhawk Crossbow, Hunter Monocular, Seasoned Hunter Skinning Knife, Deer Skull Chandelier, Boar Skull Charm, Boar Skull Trophy and Master Hunter Boots.[/p][/*][*][p][b]TIER 3 rewards include[/b] the Blackline Compound Bow, Master’s Skinning Knife, Hunter Double Bed, Wolf Skull Charm, Wolf Skull Trophy and Master Hunter Field Jacket.[/p][/*][/list][p]Physical item rewards are delivered to the trader depot when their quest is completed. Completing the quest also permanently unlocks that item for purchase from the Hunter.[/p][p]Base-building rewards work differently. Once earned, their recipes are added directly to the base-building menu, allowing you to build them whenever you have the required materials.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/6eccd6a5279501ca4b4b92dd8e6001e2a500b64f.png"][/img][b] [/b][/p][h3][b]WHERE THE SYSTEMS COME TOGETHER[/b][/h3][p]The quest rework introduced in May brought item rewards, clearer progression and a more flexible foundation for future quest lines. The Master Hunter builds on that work with new reward categories, base-building unlocks and a much larger collection of items to earn.[/p][list][*][p]You can preview upcoming tiers and their rewards before unlocking them, with locked quests showing what you need to do next.[/p][/*][*][p]The presentation of quest rewards has also been improved to make the wider range of weapons, equipment, clothing and recipes easier to understand before beginning a quest.[/p][/*][*][p]For animal kill quests, a matching animal killed within 50 meters can contribute to your quest progress when hunting with other prisoners. Completed quests can also no longer be accidentally abandoned.[/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/329e9dff9bda6aa9360b1df9c283b322f16ea2e8.png"][/img][/p][p]Together with free-roaming wildlife, tracking, bait feeders and kill quality, these changes give the Master Hunter’s quests more variety and a stronger sense of progression.[/p][h3][b]
HAVEN’T COMPLETED IT YET?[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/46737249f2444994f43602c27c23f6c76b936126.png"][/img][/p][p][b]The SCUM 1.0 Anniversary Quest is available until July 31st.[/b] [/p][p]Start it at the Hunter trader, follow the trail across the Island, and earn the Carbon Hunter Ironpaw, an exclusive weapon skin recipe. No previous quest progress is required, so every prisoner can begin straight away.[/p][p]Once unlocked, the Carbon Hunter Ironpaw can be crafted using a Carbon Hunter and a toolbox.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f3c63ed5da6ba12737a06e18912d68001afe94e3.png"][/img][/p][p]July also brings a set of practical improvements across everyday play, from faster inventory management and clearer menus to more prisoners on official servers.[/p][h3][b]MOVE EVERYTHING AT ONCE[/b][/h3][p]The new [b]Drop All[/b] option lets you empty clothing, containers and vehicles into the vicinity in a single action, including everything found inside searchable objects.[/p][p]Once the items are on the ground, [b]Pick Up All[/b] lets you collect everything from the vicinity at once.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/76c328feee67cb72c9eec16d45c75ace5c16d791.gif"][/img][/p][p]Trader depots now also have a [b]Pick Up All[/b] button. Buy several items, then collect the whole order at once instead of transferring each one individually. [/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/df14a2111c166aa7e128ea3eed254cde1dd4b8bb.gif"][/img][/p][h3][b]REFRESHED CRAFTING, COOKING AND BASE BUILDING TABS[/b][/h3][p]The Crafting, Cooking and Base Building tabs have been given a visual refresh, bringing them closer in style to the updated Inventory UI. The revised layouts make each menu clearer and more consistent to use, while giving the team a stronger foundation for future additions to these systems.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/49aeafea39c0d2e22b85639f00ea9c049d71fb91.gif"][/img][b] [/b][/p][h3][b]MORE ROOM FOR TAUNTS[/b] [/h3][p]As the number of available taunts has grown, fitting them all into one radial menu was becoming increasingly unwieldy. The redesigned taunt menu now separates base-game and DLC taunts into two categories, making them easier to browse and select.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0ac65dc93c54b662ca08b02b63f61f0d3036c4df.gif"][/img][/p][h3][b]80 PLAYERS ON OFFICIAL SERVERS[/b][/h3][p]Official servers now support up to 80 players, raising the previous limit of 64.[/p][p]We’ve been testing the increased player count across official servers and monitoring its impact on performance and stability. Following those tests, the new 80-player limit is now confirmed across official servers.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/bcecb5d811e7fa739609eba5a13be44f456717fd.gif"][/img][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/34f8bfac25bbb5ea3741aea471675e7fe0c81617.png"][/img][/p][p]Alongside the July Update, the [b]APEX[/b] [b]PREDATOR[/b] pack is now available, continuing the Into the Wild theme. This pack is separate from the update content covered in these patch notes.[/p][h2][b]Apex Predator Pack[/b][/h2][p]Built for prisoners who want to look as dangerous as the Island they’ve survived, this pack unlocks exclusive gear, weapons, charms, base-building items, character customization options, emotes, and selfie poses. [/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4635200/SCUM_Apex_Predator_Pack"][/dynamiclink][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1a448956f0b86f7f523cc489f40f36385a019d27.png"][/img][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2fbf949cbb92a7ea500f1992a719f81c53ed736e.png"][/img][/p][h3][b]KNOWN ISSUES[/b][/h3][p]The game may crash during the transition to the Island when using DLSS Balanced or Performance mode with DirectX 11. To avoid this, switch to DirectX 12, select a different DLSS preset, or use another upscaling method. The team is investigating the issue.
[/p][h3][b]HUNTING & ANIMALS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where animals would take too little damage from firearms.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where bears could survive being hit by an M82 rifle.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where prey would ignore predator sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where herbivores would not flee from nearby predators.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where an animal carcass could become too damaged after two or more hits from a high-caliber weapon.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved animal navigation balancing.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]USER INTERFACE[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where the SpicesMix_02 icon was low-resolution and contained blurry text.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the crafting component list would overlap the ‘Back’ and ‘Craft/Place’ buttons when expanded.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where items added to the cart from Hunting trader subtasks could have their quantity increased but could not be reduced or removed.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where incorrect trader icons would be displayed for raincoats.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the #DrawEnemyHealthBars command would not display Sentry health bars.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the fishing casting strength bar would remain visible while other inventory panels were open.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where certain animal heads could not be moved through the vicinity menu.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the radial progress bar would sometimes end at 50% when eating olives.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where clicking on the Goat Steak and Horse Steak icons in the Hunting trader’s menu wouldn’t add the items to the cart.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Outback Knife Sheath Twitch Drop was incorrectly listed as a crafting component for itself.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]BASE BUILDING[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where base building blueprints could snap or stick to invisible points instead of following the cursor smoothly during placement.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Zhan Ma Dao sword would float when placed on the wall-mounted weapon rack.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug that could cause the server to hang when dragging the airplane door blueprint near an airplane door frame.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where gardens could not be built on fresh databases.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]SERVER FUNCTIONALITY & SETTINGS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Added a new admin command, [c]#ListDLCItems[/c], which displays the blueprint names of spawnable items from a specified DLC pack.[/p][list][*][p]For example, entering [c]#ListDLCItems WoodlandHunterPack[/c] will list the spawnable items included in the Woodland Hunter Pack.
[b]Note:[/b] DLC items can only be spawned in single-player if you own the corresponding pack.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where restarting a server and exiting the game could bring back the old main menu.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where items would become and remain irradiated even after the radiation setting was turned off.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]VEHICLES[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where vehicles would sometimes fail to spawn in Sandbox mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where vehicles would sometimes disappear when players moved away from them in Sandbox mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where items stored in a tractor carriage would remain after the carriage was destroyed.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where Barba could fail to spawn on the map.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]WEAPONS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where weapon magazines could clip through the character’s hands during the ‘Check ammo’ animation while prone.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the bow firing animation would not be properly replicated to other players if fired in quick succession.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the improvised flashlight was incorrectly placed on the M16A4 Apocalypso.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the M70 bayonet would be incorrectly positioned on the RPK.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where arrows could be delayed and fall out of sync with the Manchu bow shooting animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Hunter85 had an inconsistent name and description.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the aiming point on the BlackHawk crossbow would be offset.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where bows sometimes couldn't nock arrows while leaning.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]QUESTS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where players would be unable to deliver quest items to a specific mailbox in Samobor.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]LEVEL DESIGN[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where some terrain surfaces used incorrect properties.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players could build chests inside of a specific rock.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where grape vines would flicker significantly.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the quest turn-in container would be floating.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where rain would fall through the B0 bunker and persist even after a relog.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where an invisible source of water in sector C4 would allow players to drink from it or fill containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where a bullet hole visual effect would appear on barrels when they were hit with a melee weapon.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where some doors in a building in sector D2 were locked and unusable, while other doors worked correctly.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a variety of level design issues, including inaccurate shadows, tree branches protruding through rocks, floating items, unnatural terrain shapes, and more.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where graffiti decals would be projected onto nearby characters.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where a wheelbarrow blueprint could be placed inside the C4 bunker.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players were unable to bury items across a large area of sector Z2.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the wooden beams inside the Hunter’s Grotto in sector A0 would not have any collision.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed inconsistent signage in safe zones, where some signposts displayed ‘Hunting’ and others displayed ‘Hunter’.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the lamp mounted on the saloon in the Z3 safe zone was missing its textures entirely.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where a quest box was placed directly behind the notice board in the radiation zone.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]OTHER[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where Fire Rings and Bonfires were destroyed when used to light cigarettes, cigars, or spliffs.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Sleeveless Shirt would clip through multiple other clothing items if equipped by a buff character.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where eating while running would interrupt the player’s movement with every bite, causing them to repeatedly stop and speed up.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players could kill one another in a safe zone by driving planes into them.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the character’s arm would become deformed while drinking from the watering can.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where drinking from a glass would cause the player to crouch and the drinking sound effect to loop indefinitely.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where a player’s corpse could disappear after they respawned in Sandbox mode while using a DLC character.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Raymond Cruz DLC character’s leg textures could be missing after death.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the male character’s arms could become deformed when wearing the SCUM shirt from the Supporter Pack DLC.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Woodland Poncho’s textures could stretch unnaturally when the player jumped.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where equipping both the Improvised Raincoat and Woodland Poncho would cause the character’s hair to disappear.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Woodland Chandelier’s destruction visual and audio effects could repeatedly trigger when teleporting nearby.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug that limited players to one Woodland Hearth. You can now build as many as you need.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where certain DLC base building elements could be spawned without owning the relevant DLC.

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0a9e94f28f7168a7c152c39eeea5f304f759d98b.png"][/img][/p][/*][/list][p]That’s it for July’s update![/p][p]Into the Wild continues through August and September, with more still to come.[/p][p]Thank you for playing and for continuing to share your feedback.[/p][p][b]Stay alive. Stay dangerous.[/b][/p]

items.title: SCUM | July Update Preview: New Tutorial, Master Hunter Quests & Mutant Animals
items.contents:
[p][b]Hey there prisoners![/b][/p][p]The July [b]Into the Wild[/b] update is coming on [b]Monday, July 20,[/b] and today we’re giving you a preview of what’s on the way.[/p][p]This update builds on the return of free-roaming animals with new Master Hunter Quests offering exclusive rewards, mutant animal variants, and quality-of-life improvements. It also introduces a new tutorial experience set inside the TEC1 Conditioning Facility.[/p][p] [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/52e8a325122667fa2239244628ab7e3411739c8d.png"][/img][/p][p][b]Before we get into the July update, we want to update you on the wider season.[/b][/p][p]When we first announced Into the Wild, we said it would run from May to July. Since then, the season has grown beyond the original three-month plan, so we’re extending it through [b]August and September[/b]. That gives the team more development time and gives each update a little more room.[/p][p]Across those next two updates, we’ll continue building on hunting, cooking, food systems, and fishing, with new challenges and further improvements still to come. The extra room also lets us bring the new TEC1 Conditioning Facility tutorial into July.[/p][p]With that covered, here’s a closer look at what’s coming in the July update.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]NEW TUTORIAL: TEC1 CONDITIONING FACILITY[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3e3e201642f84d4bf068075a3ff346f860db8b47.png"][/img]
We’re introducing a new tutorial experience for SCUM with the July update.[/p][p]The TEC1 Conditioning Facility is built to help new players learn the basics before they’re dropped onto the Island. Existing players can access it too, so it isn’t only for first-time prisoners.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4d9dfdb7000570731d52aa87ca221b1805de919c.png"][/img]
It’s a controlled survival training space where every lesson is watched, recorded, and turned into entertainment. It may be more concrete floor than forest floor, but under studio lights and TEC1 supervision, you’ll get some hands-on experience before the Island teaches you the harder lessons. 
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e73bda06f97bec782f98aada4419ec5f1c6a1c21.png"][/img][/p][carousel autoadvance="true"][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/db6219af954339ca0770cd0f679a593b8623baed.png"][/img][/carousel][p]
Outside the TEC1 Conditioning Facility, the wider tutorial system has also been reworked around a new in-game tutorial library. You can choose which tutorials to follow while you play and work through them at your own pace, rather than completing them in a fixed sequence.[/p][p]The library combines familiar and new lessons across categories including Survival, Crafting, Metabolism, Economy, Base Building, and Hunting, making it easier to find what you want to learn and track what you’ve completed.
[/p][h3][b]MUTANT ANIMALS[/b][/h3][p]Mutated wildlife has been sighted across the Island. Mutant boar, wolves, and deer are tougher, stranger versions of familiar animals, and prisoners who want to hunt them will need to track them down.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/cbefdb5d63726d76a141a87ee027b9afad0c7fc9.png"][/img][/p][p]The mutant boar and wolves hit harder and take more punishment than their regular versions. The mutant deer is more likely to bolt, so getting close enough to bring it down may be a challenge.[/p][p]If you do manage it, mutant animals can drop unique loot alongside the usual animal materials. Bring the right weapon, and don’t assume the animal is the one in trouble.
[/p][h3][b]MASTER HUNTER QUESTS & EXCLUSIVE REWARDS[/b][/h3][p]The Master Hunter arrives at the Hunter’s Grotto in July, bringing three tiers of tougher quests and exclusive rewards.[/p][p]These quests are where several Into the Wild systems and updates start coming together, including improved quest flow, free-roaming animals, tracking, bait, and kill quality.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/afcde237b503c836359d202a47522bbd30b184ff.png"][/img][/p][p]The Regular Hunter continues to offer general hunting jobs and gear, while the new Master Hunter is where you’ll find tougher challenges, mutant animal hunts, and more valuable unlocks. [/p][p]Alongside Fame, cash, gear, and discounts, Master Hunter Quests can also unlock exclusive items, including weapon charms and furniture recipes. These rewards are earned through quest progression, so prisoners who put in the work can unlock them by climbing the Master Hunter tiers.
 [/p][h3][b]CRAFTING, COOKING & BASE BUILDING UI UPDATE[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d3e936b714efa3ac1a529a9af8b1178037d3fde6.gif"][/img][/p][p]The Crafting, Cooking, and Base Building interfaces have received a visual redesign, bringing them in line with the updated Inventory UI.[/p][p]The new layouts make these menus clearer and more consistent to use, while laying the groundwork for future additions to these systems. 
[/p][h3][b]INVENTORY DROP ALL FUNCTIONALITY[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f8ef67075a306c4f283e5c1b14c34d292955736a.gif"][/img][/p][p]The update also adds a new [b]Drop All[/b] function, helping you clear space faster when you’re looting, sorting, or emptying a bag after a run.[/p][p]Especially when you’re overloaded and something nearby is closing the distance.
[/p][h3][b]MORE PRISONERS ON THE ISLAND[/b][/h3][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/329e9dff9bda6aa9360b1df9c283b322f16ea2e8.png"][/img][/h3][p]Official servers are currently testing an increase from 64 to 80 players, bringing more prisoners to the Island.[/p][p]Recent optimization work has made the test possible, and we’ll be watching performance and stability closely throughout the week. If both remain strong, 80 players will become the new default with the July update. Otherwise, official servers will return to 64. 
[/p][h3][b]MORE IN THE JULY UPDATE[/b][/h3][p]That’s the main focus for this preview, but it isn’t everything coming in July.[/p][p]The full update also includes further work on animal behavior, balance changes, fixes, and quality-of-life improvements.[/p][p]We’ll share the full patch notes when the update goes live on [b]Monday, July 20[/b].[/p][p]Until then, let us know what you’re most looking forward to.[/p][p]See you on the Island, prisoners.[/p]

items.title: SCUM - Community Showcase
items.contents:
[h3][b]The Island is alive again.[/b][/h3][p]For a time, the forests were quiet, the fields felt empty, and the mountains belonged mostly to the prisoners brave enough to cross them.[/p][p]Not anymore.[/p][p]Tracks in the dirt. Movement beyond the treeline. A distant sound that makes you stop and look twice.[/p][p]Wildlife has returned to the Island, and the community already has plenty of new survival stories to tell.[/p][p]The latest update has brought out some truly impressive hunters. Not that you weren’t impressive before. We just gave you more animals, tools and opportunities to prove it.[/p][p]Here’s how prisoners have been experiencing the wilder Island.

 [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/17026f05d81aaf86f19a1fab1bb6981384d98fa2.png"][/img][/p][h3]First Encounters[/h3][p]The return of free-roaming animals means every journey can take an unexpected turn.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/9376215cd6ad10932aceb8bdb3f1628fda3e1a08.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Yes, we said carcasses could attract unexpected predators. Apparently, that also applies when you’re dead inside.[/i] [i]Anyway, made a new friend. [/i]🐻[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3757341622"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/092881f7c288be893773ce922f610e12a5f7f87c.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Santa lost [/i]another reindeer…[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3758062012"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/19ba22dfe60d54b494e2a3864a1c06b04720073e.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Some of you think the Island’s wildlife could use a little more cardio.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3756310543"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c77ca04ebfc8ca67f419854bfc86fd329fc5d7b7.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]The survival instincts of this particular boar are not exactly excelling. [b]Free dinner![/b][/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3757180555"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/29daa8a046f4ac0f0e2e423283653a24ecd5b6a9.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]I got the horses in the back… Roof rack is attached...[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3760788497"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f22631959cf1d4c2347c6bc12ba6ba4b2cf60d67.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The friendliest encounter on the Island this month.[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3758926376"]Link to original[/url] [/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/df4218f076762657a3082ac5e777c29464c8bfef.png"][/img][/h3][p]We had our fun with the first encounters on the Island, now it's time to see the real deal. Here’s how the community handled hunting with the return of free-roaming wildlife![/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/5c7493b8d2547c144a64e7f3dfc0d49813295190.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Patience and stealth are always the key to a successful hunt.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3756311077"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b790440b5902fb9c547562134d787441dc3d6f22.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Exhibit A: the perfect shot.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3760123293"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/49734fb8d053a43520c3418ee3caa54cd3fde1ba.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Some encounters require a little more courage. Taking down a bear is no small achievement.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3757935418"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/19d0c746fae948a5d49f0e48390f05671b2fadff.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Another successful hunt… This will never get boar-ing![/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3755524684"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4a890ffb8750fc10c4a111d3ca19d420b334cc9b.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Now, let's take a look at what we call excessive overhunting. The chances of all this meat going bad are pretty high… unless you get yourself one of those bad-boy smokers we introduced not too long ago![/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3760285556"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/18cb98956116c7236ebcf209728665ebf4a25de1.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]This furry little fella's gonna make a nice pair of slippers.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3755847908"]Link to original[/url] [/p][/*][/list][p]We’ve also heard rumours that the finest rare trophy-fish wall mounts may appear in the next showcase.[/p][p]You know what to do.[/p][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/73d8e3670cdd0d706e1f7ce53b640f390f668e86.png"][/img][/h3][p]Survival isn't just about about staying alive. It is about making the most of what you find.[/p][p]This month, prisoners turned basic ingredients into proper meals, proving that SCUM survivors can occasionally cook something that doesn’t look suspicious.[/p][p]Sort of...

Let’s meet the Island’s next top chefs.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f02fda3962bba70f5daec63364e9710a2ab4e086.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]With heels like these, who needs skewers?[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3759842363"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/77f5f0aa27be931d9df72e083551ca268e5dd151.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]That is definitely one way to make sushi.[/i] [/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3760123168"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/fae785bcb9c904b90de114a11c9a43ca98ccea13.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]You can’t go wrong with a large, juicy steak! Pass the butter![/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3755777699"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f28b04d5f5e0f13e33ce4106980461d021024804.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]New pasta dish is staying true to its name - Gourmet? No. Improvised? [b]Absolutely.[/b][/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/444216793020760064/1524203284129386707"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1391bf975e8c617dd44cd0e49a8d9da4baf6e8ed.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]The Island won't judge where you build your campfire (we might) - desperate times call for desperate measures prisoner?[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3754249162"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c99ef0da8bf304103f45e0cb84ecadd48de3e053.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Some prisoners were not fortunate enough to catch dinner. Better luck tomorrow.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3759381599"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]Remembering Those No Longer With Us[/h3][p]With the new tombstone feature, we gave you the opportunity to honor just about anything and leave your mark across the Island. For the most part, you kept it respectful, and we appreciate that.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/50905b25114d4c0a9afaf4b06e1eaa376a157a63.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]The harsh reality of SCUM: even Love, Hope, and Dreams didn't make it. RIP[/i] 🪦[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3756881598"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c01af913d834fea4ca50668fc1699c6a3d31d1ae.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]We don't know who John Hinster is, but we hope he's still out there somewhere.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3759401525"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]Screenshots only tell part of the story. Here's some moments from the community that are better seen in motion.[/p][p]Take a look at this sick castle built by [b]Evatox[/b]! The perfect residence for the King of Hunters, it has it all: multiple rooms, a kitchen, a fireplace, great decor, a spacious yard, and most importantly - a 360° view for the ultimate hunting experience.[/p][previewyoutube="aLyEo3llcbo;full"][/previewyoutube][p]
[b]Casual Wardog[/b] goes over our new June update and tries the new Anniversary Quest. Check out what he had to say about it. [/p][previewyoutube="6INNWGal18g;full"][/previewyoutube][hr][/hr][p]Thanks for playing and making the Island your own.[/p][p]Happy hunting, prisoners![/p]

items.title: Hotfix - 1.3.1.1.128880
items.contents: [p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p align="start"]Hot on the heels of the June update, we’re releasing a hotfix for the most pressing issues you’ve encountered out in the wild. You can view the full list of resolved issues and adjustments below.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/baeea3d2d67fd5e6e4628afe0f6f059b2b46dc20.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]SERVER SETTING CHANGES [/h3][list][*][p]Increased the maximum number of flags per person to 100.[/p][/*][*][p]Reduced the number of animals in the world by modifying the following settings:[/p][list][*][p]scum.AnimalGlobalDensityMultiplier = 1.000000 -> 0.500000[/p][/*][*][p]scum.MaxNonVirtualAnimalsInWorld = 800 -> 500[/p][p] [/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][h3]SERVER & CONNECTIVITY[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a server crash that could occur when spilling liquids out of containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug which would disconnect players from the game after making a big purchase at a trader.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]INVENTORY[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that allowed crafted chests to be sold for money.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug which made some items in the inventory immovable.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where items from the inventory would visually disappear upon entering a vehicle.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where inventory item movement would be blocked when attempting to move it either right or down.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]WEAPONS[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug which caused weapon attachments to be dropped to the ground when removed via quick access.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the character would stand up when reloading the MAC-10 while mounted on the RIS or Dirtbike.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where aiming with the RPG-7 was offset while aiming down the sight.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the MAC-10 magazine color would not change when painting the entire weapon.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the Hunter85 paint would appear transparent or faded.[/p][p] [/p][/*][/list][h3]USER INTERFACE[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where a pop-up would appear for a split second and then disappear when connecting to a server for the first time.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where the context menu for the Gas Lantern would display 'Gasoline Required' instead of 'Container Full'.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where hovering over any base building blueprint would cause item icons to disappear or display incorrectly. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where quest item turn-in containers could break inventory item icons and interactions by making them disappear or corrupted.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]HUNTING[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where animals sometimes would not receive headshot damage from a large caliber weapon.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where animals would use their far-distance LOD when viewed through a scope even though they are physically close.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where animals could leave tracks on cement roads.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]BASE BUILDING[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where base building element coloring would not be saved in the database.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where certain base buildings elements were missing the 'Paint' option.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]OTHER[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a bug where a cut-off between body and head textures would be visible in the character creator.[/p][/*][*][p]Added new detections for the anti-cheat violation manager.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]As always, if you've encountered anything else that requires our attention, please let us know via the following channels:[/p][list][*][p][b][url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/?snr=1_2108_9__2107"]Bug reports forum on Steam[/url][/b][/p][/*][*][p][b][url="https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.scum.game%2F"]Official SCUM support[/url][/b][/p][/*][/list]

items.title: SCUM: INTO THE WILD - June Update | 1.3.1.0.125621
items.contents:
[h3][b]Hey Prisoners,[/b][/h3][h3][b]Free-roaming land animals are back![/b][/h3][p]June’s [b]Into the Wild[/b] update returns wildlife to the Island, along with a limited-time SCUM 1.0 Anniversary quest, trophy fish wall mounts, improvised cooking recipes, customizable tombstones, new custom server settings, fixes, and more improvements based on player feedback.[/p][h3][b]Watch the Free-roaming Animals Dev Diary[/b][/h3][p]For a deeper look at the work behind free-roaming land animals, watch the Free-Roaming Animals Dev Diary, going live alongside this update: [/p][previewyoutube="UKm5Jm8-yQA;full"][/previewyoutube][p]As shared in the [url="https://steamcommunity.com/games/513710/announcements/detail/697641379212296318?snr=2___"][b]June Update Preview[/b][/url], this update includes a partial official server wipe. [/p][p]Character progress, gold, and basic starting gear remain, while vehicles, bases, and all other items on official servers have been reset.[/p][p]We know a mid-season wipe is disruptive, and we’re sorry for the impact on affected players. Going forward, our intention is to align planned wipes with the start of a season wherever possible, so players have clearer expectations around major resets.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4b9fcb6aba253dc2f6bc8074cc0b2e64ac2bc3f8.png"][/img][/p][p]With free-roaming animals back on the Island, wildlife is once again part of the world around you, rather than something you only encounter through a separate hunting flow.[/p][p]This isn’t the old animal system being switched back on. Animals were previously removed for performance reasons, so bringing them back properly meant rebuilding the wildlife system around SCUM as it exists today.[/p][p]Animals can now roam through the world instead of only appearing as part of a separate hunting flow. The hunting minigame has also been removed, so you now find, follow, and hunt animals directly in the world.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b8813659d25de5af72ba34f12ec5881eced36e37.gif"][/img]Under the new system, wildlife is shaped by where you are, what you can see, and what the world is doing around you. Biome populations, time of day, player distance, visibility, and Level of Detail \[LoD] animal AI all play a role.[/p][p]Not every animal needs to run in a fully active state all the time. Animals can move between lighter and fully active simulation states depending on distance, visibility, and nearby player activity. That means a hunt can begin with movement on a distant ridge, continue as you close the distance, and develop naturally instead of only starting when an animal is already nearby.

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/5357f0ca70d3f046fb6445f6fd1d6f3aa646c661.png"][/img][b]
[/b][/p][h2][b]WILDLIFE ACROSS THE ISLAND[/b][/h2][h3][b]
Animal spawning is biome-based[/b][/h3][p]Now that free-roaming land animals are back in the world, wildlife spawns through biome-based populations. Mountains, forests, fields, and other areas can support different animals, giving each part of the Island its own wildlife profile.[/p][h3][b]Wildlife changes over time[/b][/h3][p]Wildlife population updates happen throughout the in-game day, with time of day also influencing spawning. This helps the world respond more naturally as animals are hunted, replaced, or shifted across their biome population. An area that felt quiet earlier may not stay that way forever.[/p][h3][b]Animals persist beyond your immediate range[/b][/h3][p]The new Level of Detail \[LoD] system keeps wildlife present across the Island without every animal running at full server cost all the time. Animals can remain part of the world while far away or out of view, then move into a fully active state as you spot them, approach them, or move through the area.

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/cc736bb40f2a6dc1ea360a50b98e89564dc8d810.gif"][/img][/p][h2][b]HUNTING IN THE OPEN WORLD[/b][/h2][p][/p][h3][b]Scouting is part of the hunt [/b][/h3][p]Animals become part of the hunt when spotted at range through clear line of sight, with scope magnification letting this happen from farther away. Binoculars and scoped weapons now have a clearer role, giving you another reason to scan ridgelines, treelines, and open ground before moving in. Use foliage and line of sight to plan your approach before you close the distance.
 [/p][h3][b]Predators share the hunting ground[/b][/h3][p]Because wildlife now exists through biome-based populations, prey and predators can move through the same areas. Scout before you move in, and stay aware of what else may be nearby. A bear beyond the treeline can end a hunt fast.
[/p][h3][b]Carcasses can attract predators[/b][/h3][p]Leaving a dead animal behind may draw nearby predators to the carcass. Every kill can create an opportunity, or a problem if you stay too long.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7d80306b8f32561584c0c1ca5cb65719bf90d09c.gif"][/img][/p][p][/p][h2][b]BUILDING ON FREE-ROAMING ANIMALS[/b][/h2][h3][b]
Bait feeders now work with wildlife populations[/b][/h3][p]Bait Feeders have been updated to fit the reworked wildlife population system. They can attract existing animals nearby, or spawn a suitable animal if there are none around, so using one should still feel rewarding. [/p][h3][b]Animal AI has moved to Behavior Trees[/b][/h3][p]Animal AI now uses Unreal’s Behavior Tree framework, giving us a stronger base for improving behaviors, tuning animal-specific encounters, and supporting more varied wildlife threats in future updates.[/p][h3][b]Land animals are the focus for now[/b][/h3][p]This update focuses on free-roaming land animals first, rebuilding tracking, hunting, predator behavior, and carcasses around animals that exist directly in the world. Puppets, NPCs, birds, and other world spawns are separate systems, but this work gives us a stronger foundation for future improvements across the Island.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/442c16e74b72be4bd78c02ee5f511ac255848b3b.gif"][/img][/p][h3][b]
Thank you, Public Alpha players[/b][/h3][p]Thank you to everyone who took part in the Free-Roaming Animals Public Alpha. Your feedback helped us test the system under real server conditions, identify edge cases, and continue tuning how animals spawn, move, flee, die, and interact with the world.[/p][p]This is a major foundation for wildlife in SCUM. As more players spend time with the new system, we’ll keep watching how it performs in live conditions and continue improving animal behaviors.
 [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3c71141b98037e2ce12a27e6bc7fa76a05c575b8.png"][/img][/p][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/5bcab67b2f30c66627606eb09290563bd5326206.png"][/img][/h3][h3][b]A hunter’s left a trail across the Island. Follow it, survive it, and you can earn the Carbon Hunter Ironpaw, an exclusive SCUM 1.0 Anniversary weapon skin recipe.[/b][/h3][p][b]This limited-time quest runs until July 31[/b] and can be started at the Hunter trader. No previous quest progress is required, so all prisoners can begin straight away.[/p][p]With free-roaming land animals back on the Island, this quest gives you another reason to head into the wild, follow the diary pages, and prove yourself against the new hunt.[/p][p]Once unlocked, the Carbon Hunter Ironpaw can be crafted using a Carbon Hunter and a toolbox, matching the crafting flow for other weapon skin variants.[/p][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1f5547216a27a21a80798ccb04465396b2aed441.png"][/img][/p][h2][b]TROPHY FISH WALL MOUNTS[/b][/h2][p]Rare trophy fish can now be caught at select fishing spots. Carp, Tuna, Catfish, Pike, and Dentex can all be turned into decorative trophies for your base.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/482dbd7cb36d6e002fcbec96c9171d3711716d4f.png"][/img][/p][p]Trophy fish are separate from regular fish. Once caught, they can be chopped to collect the head, which can then be crafted into a decorative wall mount using a wooden plank and a sharp tool.[/p][p]Put them on display and give your squad a reason to believe your fishing stories.
[/p][h2][b]IMPROVISED COOKING RECIPES[/b][/h2][p]We’ve added the first improvised cooking recipes, giving players a more flexible way to turn basic ingredients into a cooked meal.[/p][p]You can now prepare:[/p][list][*][p][b]Improvised Pasta Dish[/b][/p][/*][*][p][b]Improvised Rice Dish[/b][/p][/*][*][p][b]Improvised Soup[/b][/p][/*][*][p][b]Improvised Stew[/b][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/941248be33c7eb52ea58f68bbed2874d7c7b53ca.png"][/img][/p][p]Unlike many existing recipes, improvised recipes are available by default and don’t require a cooking book to unlock. They also use simpler core requirements, then let you add a wider range of optional ingredients to improve the dish when you have more supplies.[/p][p]Better ingredients still help, but you should now be able to cook something useful without needing a long list of exact items first.
[/p][h2][b]TOMBSTONES[/b][/h2][p]Players have asked for more ways to mark meaningful places on the Island, including memorials for members of their communities. This update adds a new craftable tombstone that can be placed in the world and customized with player-written text.[/p][p]Use them for memories, warnings, threats, or whatever your squadmate did to deserve it. 
Try to keep the spelling mistakes to a minimum.[/p][p]Tombstones are built from a blueprint recipe using stones and any hammer. Once placed and finished, hold F to add your chosen text, which will appear on the tombstone.

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d915664220abc6bcbd018c0afe6209b9b1b0b400.png"][/img][/p][p]They can be placed anywhere that supports the blueprint, but they still need to be maintained. By default, tombstones decay after 30 days if left unattended, so prisoners will need to return from time to time to pay their respects.[/p][p]Server owners can control how many tombstones each squad can build, from 0 to 100 per squad. Official servers use the default limit of 3 per squad. [/p][h1][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/34f8bfac25bbb5ea3741aea471675e7fe0c81617.png"][/img][/h1][p]Alongside the June Update, two new optional DLC packs are now available, continuing the Into the Wild theme. These packs are separate from the June Update content covered in these patch notes.[/p][h2][b]Specialist Archer Pack[/b][/h2][p]Unlock snakeskin-themed specialist gear, charms, emotes, and camouflage patterns.
[dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4635240/SCUM_Specialist_Archer_Pack/"][/dynamiclink][/p][h2][b]Specialist Scout Pack[/b][/h2][p]Unlock scout-inspired specialist gear, charms, emotes, and camouflage patterns.[/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4635250/SCUM_Specialist_Scout_Pack/"][/dynamiclink] [/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0a9e94f28f7168a7c152c39eeea5f304f759d98b.png"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e74b7def554ac2e5a9dbe9e439b2782916f39a8f.png"][/img][/p][p]This update adds new custom server controls for free-roaming animals, fishing spots, radiation, flag ownership, and tombstones, while removing older hunting settings that are no longer used by the new free-roaming wildlife system. Some vehicle settings have also been consolidated, with control moving into the relevant maximum vehicle settings.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]FREE-ROAMING ANIMALS[/b][/h3][list][*][p][b]Animals Allowed in World[/b] 
\[World] -> HUNTING 
[c][b]scum.AreAnimalsAllowedInWorld=True[/b][/c][/p][p]Enables or disables free-roaming animals in the world.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p][b]Animal Global Density Multiplier
[/b]\[World] -> HUNTING
[c][b]scum.AnimalGlobalDensityMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c][/p][p]Controls the global animal density cap, increasing this value increases the total number of animals that can exist in the world.[/p][p]Default: 1
Minimum: 0
Maximum: 25[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p][b]Maximum Non-Virtual Animals in World[/b]
\[World] -> HUNTING
[c][b]scum.MaxNonVirtualAnimalsInWorld=800[/b][/c][/p][p]Controls the maximum number of non-virtual animal actors that can be present in the world at once. Virtual animal population entries can exist beyond this number.[/p][p]Default: 800 
Minimum: 0 
Maximum: 2500[/p][/*][*][p][b]Animal Population Representation Multipliers[/b] 
\[World] -> HUNTING[/p][p]These settings control how strongly each animal type is represented within biomes where that animal is allowed to spawn. Values can be increased or reduced, and work in relation to the other valid animals in that biome.[/p][p]Default for all populations: 1
Minimum: 0
Maximum: 100[/p][p]For example, in a biome that can spawn bears and goats, increasing the bear multiplier or reducing the goat multiplier can both make bears more likely to appear compared to goats.[/p][p][c][b]scum.BearPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: BEAR POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.BoarPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: BOAR POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.ChickenPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: CHICKEN POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.DeerPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: DEER POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.DonkeyPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: DONKEY POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.GoatPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: GOAT POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.HorsePrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: HORSE POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.RabbitPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: RABBIT POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][p][c][b]scum.WolfPrevalenceMultiplier=1.000000[/b][/c]
In-game name: WOLF POPULATION REPRESENTATION MULTIPLIER[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]FISHING[/b][/h3][list][*][p][b]High-Activity Fishing Spots[/b] 
\[World] -> HUNTING 
[c][b]scum.FishingHighActivityZoneAmount=-1.000000[/b][/c][/p][p]Adds a server setting for controlling the number of high-activity fishing spots. By default, 10% of fishing spots are always active.[/p][p]Default: 10%[/p][p]Minimum: 0%[/p][p]Maximum: 100%[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]RADIATION[/b][/h3][list][*][p][b]Radiation Enabled[/b] 
\[World] -> MAP 
[b][c]scum.RadiationEnabled=True[/c][/b][/p][p]Enables or disables radiation in the world.[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]FLAG OWNERSHIP[/b][/h3][list][*][p][b]Maximum Flags Per Prisoner[/b] 
\[Features] -> BASE BUILDING 
[c][b]scum.NumberOfAllowedFlagsPerPlayer=10[/b][/c][/p][p]Adds a server setting allowing admins to define how many flags each prisoner can own at a time. [i]NOTE: scum.AllowMultipleFlagsPerPlayer needs to be enabled for this setting to work.[/i][/p][p]Default: 10[/p][p]Minimum: 1[/p][p]Maximum: 30[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]TOMBSTONES[/b][/h3][list][*][p][b]Maximum Tombstones Per Squad[/b] 
\[Features] -> BASE BUILDING 
[c][b]scum.TombstoneMaxAmountPerSquad[/b][/c][/p][p]Adds a server setting for controlling how many tombstones each squad can build.[/p][p]Default: 3[/p][p]Minimum: 0[/p][p]Maximum: 100
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]CONSOLIDATED VEHICLE SETTINGS [/b][/h3][p]The following vehicle-specific [b]MaxFunctionalAmount[/b] settings are no longer available as separate settings. They have been consolidated into the relevant maximum vehicle settings for vehicles where [b]MaxFunctionalAmount[/b] did not have a separate effect. [/p][p]Server owners can still control the overall maximums for these vehicles through the max vehicle settings.[/p][p][c][b]scum.KingletDusterMaxFunctionalAmount 
scum.MotorboatMaxFunctionalAmount 
scum.WheelbarrowMaxFunctionalAmount 
scum.BicycleMaxFunctionalAmount 
scum.SUPMaxFunctionalAmount 
scum.KingletMarinerMaxFunctionalAmount 
scum.DinghyMaxFunctionalAmount[/b][/c][/p][p][/p][h3][b]SETTINGS NO LONGER AVAILABLE[/b][/h3][p]The following settings are no longer available in-game, many were tied to the previous hunting encounter setup and are not used by the new free-roaming wildlife system:[/p][p]
[b][c]scum.PuppetLimpingEnabled[/c] [c]- Replaced by setting ''Puppet limping health threshold'' to 0 scum.ArmedNPCLimpingEnabled - Replaced by setting ''Armed NPC limping health threshold'' to 0
scum.MaxAllowedAnimals 
scum.MaxAllowedHunts 
scum.AnimalWorldEncounterSpawnWeightMultiplier 
scum.HuntTriggerChanceOverride_ContinentalForest scum.HuntTriggerChanceOverride_ContinentalMeadow 
scum.HuntTriggerChanceOverride_Mediterranean 
scum.HuntTriggerChanceOverride_Mountain 
scum.HuntTriggerChanceOverride_Urban 
scum.HuntTriggerChanceOverride_Village 
scum.HuntFailureTime 
scum.HuntFailureDistance
scum.NPCWorldEncounterSpawnWeightMultiplier 
scum.MasterServerEndpoints [/c][/b][/p][h3][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2fbf949cbb92a7ea500f1992a719f81c53ed736e.png"][/img][/p][h3][b]CRASHES[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a crash that could occur when opening the radial menu immediately after relogging.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a client crash that could sometimes occur when reskinning or destroying Woodland base building elements.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a client crash caused by opening the console or chat while in Drone mode.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]EXPLOITS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed and adjusted several sentry-related exploits that allowed unintended farming or looting.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an exploit that allowed players to farm animals, specifically bears, using the Animal Bait Feeder.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an infinite ammo box exploit where players could sell a 1/30 ammo box to a trader who did not already have that ammo box in stock, then buy back a 30/30 ammo box.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where vehicles could be destroyed inside trader zones and other protected areas where explosive damage to vehicles is disabled. This could happen when a frag grenade was placed on the ground with the pin pulled, allowing nearby vehicles to be damaged despite protected zone settings.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]PRIVATE SERVERS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue affecting private servers where players were unable to connect. This problem was linked to ICMP-related checks and has been resolved. Private servers should now function correctly out of the box with only standard port forwarding, without requiring additional firewall adjustments or workarounds.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]HUNTING & COOKING[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Added a fuel bar / gauge mechanic to meat smokers and other fire-based objects, similar to existing liquid, petrol, and propane indicators. The gauge now visually displays remaining fuel and updates as fuel is consumed.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where placing fruit or seeds into a Bait Feeder could make them non-expirable and cause the Bait Feeder to produce smoke endlessly.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where goats did not leave footprint trails.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where does \[female deer] could provide antlers. Only bucks \[male deer] now provide antlers.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where direct hits from RPGs and grenade launchers did not properly affect animal kill quality \[these kills were functioning like a rifle shot]. Explosive impacts now correctly damage harvested resources.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed the redundant Search interaction from animals killed by a flamethrower, as flamethrowers do not fire recoverable projectiles.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where flamethrower kills did not affect meat and skin condition correctly.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where animals killed by vehicles or turrets retained 100% skin and meat quality.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue in Sandbox mode where smoked meat could disappear from the smoker after logging out to the main menu.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the incorrect ingredients in the Hot Chocolate recipe.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issues where Bait Feeders were not spawning animals as intended.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where baits intended to spawn deer did not trigger any reaction when placed into the Bait Feeder in blue zones marked on the Island Wildlife Guide map.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Bait Feeders could spawn animals underwater when placed on shipwrecks, small islands, or underwater.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Bait Feeders placed in towns could sometimes cause animals to spawn inside buildings or become stuck in concrete.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where boars could spawn on Bait Feeders placed inside caves.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where animal loot degradation from bullet penetration was applied uniformly regardless of projectile type. Loot degradation now scales correctly based on projectile penetration values.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]QUESTS & TASKS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]The Bait Feeders hunting task has returned after being temporarily removed in the previous update. It has now been updated to work with the new free-roaming animal system, guiding players through placing a Bait Feeder, adding suitable bait, and using it to attract wildlife.[/p][/*][*][p]Quests now display more like tutorial tasks. Instead of showing the full quest sequence up front, the quest book now focuses on your current step, then reveals the next step once the current one has been completed.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the hunting task subtask “Place rabbit food inside the Bait Feeder” did not complete after placing the required rabbit food into the Bait Feeder.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an edge case where the hunting task subtask “Travel to a natural area with wild rabbits” could stop updating if the player reached the objective while inside a trader zone.[/p][/*][*][p]Renamed the first hunting tutorial task so it no longer shares the same title as the overall Hunting task category.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where hunting tasks could not be abandoned once accepted.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where items unlocked through quests did not reset their available purchase quantity correctly after partial purchases. Available quantities now reset to the intended full amount each time the quest is completed.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]FISHING & FARMING[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where plants could sometimes not be watered in multiplayer sessions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Next Harvest timer was not displayed on plants when the server had accumulated a very high playtime value.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the gardening UI could report cold conditions and hindered plant growth even when the temperature was high.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the fishing rod could break and flail around while the fishing minigame was active, causing attached items to be lost.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where water was not applied when watering crops, even after spilling a full can.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where most fully grown tree-based plants could block interaction with nearby low-height plants due to branch collision or interaction traces. This affected all tree-based plants except orange trees.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Boilies fish bait appeared white in the in-game model while the inventory icon showed it as red. Boilies bait now appears red both in the inventory and in-game model, including when attached to a fishing rod.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]WEAPONS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Weapon attachments can now be painted.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a visual bug where optics and rangefinders could flicker when aiming down sights.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where PU scope range markings were cut off when used with the M1891. This also affected the Vampyr, SpektralDR, and P223 scopes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a small visual issue with incorrect colors on the Wushu Spear tassel.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where a nocked arrow was sometimes not visible to nearby players after firing and nocking another arrow.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where thrown knives could hit puppets, NPCs, and players but fail to attach to the target. Thrown knives now properly stick to the target and remain visibly attached to the body or equipment. Affected knives include Bushman, Shuriken, Scout Black, Scout White, Hunter, and Kunai.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed inconsistent caliber naming in weapon descriptions for weapons using .30-06 ammunition. Relevant weapons now use consistent .30-06 naming.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]BASE BUILDING[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where Wall Squad Emblem Flags \[Improvised and Premium] could be placed over wall-mounted weapon racks, lamps, and trophies, causing them to clip.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where destroying L-shaped twig stairs could also destroy advanced doors.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Improvised Chandelier context menu showed Remove Current Skin instead of Apply Skin. Also fixed an issue where Remove Current Skin did not work on the Woodland Chandelier.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Improvised Chandelier could transform into a Woodland Chandelier after relogging in Sandbox mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Added a decorative lit hearth to the Woodland Furniture Pack.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the base building destruction log displayed internal in-game names.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where base building element names and hints were not translated in context menus for Chinese and Simplified Chinese.[/p][/*][*][p]Updated and improved visuals for base building placement meshes.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]TRADER[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Aligned the Hunter trader naming convention across the game. He is now referred to as the Hunter consistently.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed multiple Ghillie suit items at the Armorer sharing the same display name. Each item is now correctly named.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where items from subtasks added to the Hunter trader cart could have their quantity increased, but could not be reduced or removed afterward.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the driving glove icon at the trader showed fingered gloves, but fingerless gloves appeared after purchase.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where MREs did not appear in the Armorer trader’s stock after being sold to him.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Hippie Shirt #2 icon in the General Goods trader menu showed the wrong item.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a missing comma in economy.json after the prices-subject-to-delta line, which could cause issues for players modifying traders.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]UI[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where item icons could change size when placed into a Quick Access slot already used by another item.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed UI overlap issues in cooking recipes with many possible ingredients, where expanded main and optional ingredient lists could extend through the Back button without being scrollable.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the plucked chicken icon incorrectly showed a liquid capacity UI element.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a blurry Biker Leather Jacket icon.[/p][/*][*][p]Replaced weapons displayed around the Armorer trader that could no longer be bought from the trader.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue in Sandbox mode where the liquid progress bar did not update correctly, showing liquid remaining while the ‘Check’ interaction reported that the container was empty.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where ‘Bone’ was listed multiple times in the Possible Ingredients section for the Meat Soup recipe.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with the Grilled Veggie recipe where the interface always showed Bell Pepper regardless of which vegetable was used.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where opening chat while the weapon malfunction UI was active, or vice versa, caused the mouse cursor to behave incorrectly. Chat input is now blocked while the weapon malfunction UI is displayed.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]ANIMATION[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a misaligned first-person view when holding the Bait Feeder.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grip animations for the Skinning Knife and Blackhawk Crossbow.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bottles clipping through the prisoner’s face while drinking beverages in first-person perspective.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several bottle holding and drinking animation issues where certain drinks could clip through the hand when using Drink or Drink All. Fixed an issue where the hand could clip through bottles while holding or drinking from them.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]AUDIO[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed a sound and video effect issue that triggered at the start or cancellation of the Destroy action on some reskinned base building elements, instead of when their destruction finished.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where footsteps on tree stumps used the wrong surface sound, making them sound like concrete.[/p][/*][*][p]Added humming sound effects to wind turbines and electro houses.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where subtitles would only appear briefly when voice line volume was set to 0. Subtitles now remain visible correctly.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]GRAPHICS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Improved bottle visuals and liquid effects. Fixed an issue where spilled liquids from bottles, canisters, and other containers always used the same visual color regardless of the liquid being poured out. Spilled liquid color now matches the liquid inside the container.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where ocean reflections shifted noticeably when moving the camera left and right.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where some post-process effects were left enabled when no post-process should appear on screen.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where glass surfaces, drinks, rain puddles, and other liquids could appear to glow or emit light in dark environments, especially in low-light areas such as abandoned bunkers.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]LEVEL DESIGN[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where rain could pass through bunkers in B0 and D4 after relogging.[/p][/*][*][p]Restored a missing section of river in the C0 sector.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed multiple places in the Hunter’s Grotto where players could get stuck. Added collision to the painting in the Hunter’s Grotto.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed dozens of level design issues, including trees growing through rocks, low-resolution rock and snow textures, floating assets, assets clipping through each other, missing textures, sharp terrain transitions, disappearing shadows, incorrect door collisions, and misplaced snow textures on rooftops in the Z sector.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]OTHER[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Players can now paint chests regardless of flag area restrictions, including chests with locks and chests placed outside a flag area.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a Sandbox mode issue where a player’s corpse could disappear after respawning and returning to the corpse’s location.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where colliding or overlapping with an animal while in a vehicle could cause the camera to snap upward. This affected cars, bikes, RIS, and all animals except wolves.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where headlamps could appear turned on in third person, to other players, or in photo mode, even when they had no batteries and were actually turned off.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the player’s torso could display incorrectly in the character creation mugshot, causing the body skin tone to not match the head and neck, or causing missing textures.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where a player standing on a vehicle could appear in an incorrect position to another player moving outside the vehicle’s streaming or render range.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed incorrect item parameters on the Snow Deluxe Inmate Hoodie.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where players could turn on the Metal Detector while it was in a holster slot.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where player corpses could disappear while the killed player was waiting on the respawn screen. The corpse would reappear when the killed player respawned or closed the client.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where drink items could not become irradiated.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where male character body attributes \[8/5/5] could clip through the Sleeveless Shirt and other affected clothing items, including Military Shirt, Police Shirt, Woodcutter Shirt, Inmate Shirt, Hospital Shirt, and Vintage Jail Shirt.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where puppets and armed NPCs attempted to navigate through doors inside the airport building that are not usable or traversable. They now use only valid paths.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed incorrect values in the descriptions for large POI character spawn and respawn distances.[/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0a9e94f28f7168a7c152c39eeea5f304f759d98b.png"][/img][/p][h3][b]KNOWN ISSUES[/b][/h3][p]We’re continuing to track a few known issues and will keep rolling out fixes and tuning after release:[/p][list][*][p]Large animal turning behavior may feel too aggressive in some encounters.[/p][/*][*][p]Animal tracks may appear on some hard surfaces, including cement roads.[/p][/*][*][p]Some animals may not always take damage as expected from firearms or headshots.[/p][/*][*][p]Animals viewed through scopes may sometimes remain in their far-distance Level of Detail \[LoD] state instead of updating correctly.[/p][/*][*][p]Tombstone inscription text may overflow or wrap awkwardly in some cases.[/p][/*][*][p]Some item icons may disappear or display incorrectly in specific blueprint or quest item interactions.[/p][/*][*][p]Some item paint or attachment visuals may not apply correctly in specific cases.[/p][/*][*][p]Items inside quivers or holsters may become invisible after being recovered from a corpse in multiplayer. Relogging should make the items visible again.[/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0a9e94f28f7168a7c152c39eeea5f304f759d98b.png"][/img]That’s it for June’s update![/p][p]Into the Wild continues in July, with more work focused on helping prisoners find their footing and discover new reasons to push deeper into the Island.[/p][p]Thank you for playing, sharing your feedback, and sticking with us as SCUM keeps moving.[/p][p]See you on the Island! [/p]

items.title: SCUM | Public Alpha Update: New Free-Roaming Wildlife Build Now Live
items.contents:
[h3][b]// UPDATE //[/b][/h3][p][b]The June Into the Wild update is now scheduled for Tuesday, June 30.[/b][/p][p]We’re moving the update by one day so the team can take extra time for final checks and fixes before release.[/p][p]Thanks for your patience. We’ll share the full patch notes when the update is live. 
___[b] [/b][/p][p][b]Prisoners,[/b][/p][p]We’ve released a new Alpha Playtest build for free-roaming animals.[/p][p]Thank you to everyone who has already jumped into the Alpha Playtest and shared feedback. Your reports have helped the team identify issues, validate fixes, and better understand how free-roaming animals behave outside internal testing.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1cc182dd2ff965fd8aa9bba8ffe504d5d18142f1.png"][/img][/p][p]
If you’re able to spend some time in the Alpha Playtest, this latest build gives the team more to learn from. Free-roaming animals behave differently across servers, locations, times of day, player counts, and playstyles, so continued testing helps us validate fixes and spot edge cases before the system moves closer to release.[/p][p]This build focuses on improving animal behaviour, population updates, death states, performance, and some of the issues reported during recent tests.[/p][p][/p][h2][b]CHANGES IN THE LATEST PUBLIC ALPHA \[JUNE 25TH][/b][/h2][p][/p][p]This Public Alpha update focuses on animal perception, bait feeders, movement, combat behavior, audio, and performance improvements.[/p][p][/p][p][b]Animal & Hunting System Updates:[/b][/p][list][*][p]Added a new animal perception system that takes animal type and player camouflage into account[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Added animal reactions to nearby projectile impacts, affecting alert, investigation, flee, and hostile behaviors[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Improved how distant animals activate as players approach, reducing cases where animals appear too late when traveling at higher speeds[/p][/*][*][p]Improved line-of-sight checks for animal behavior[/p][/*][*][p]Updated underlying hunting system logic to support more consistent animal population and bait feeder behavior[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][b]Bait Feeder Updates:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Improved bait feeder spawning behavior[/p][/*][*][p]Improved spawning balance around bait feeders[/p][/*][*][p]Animals should no longer spawn behind players when using bait feeders[/p][/*][*][p]Animals should now move closer to
