bait feeders more reliably[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where bait feeders could stop working correctly after a failed animal spawn attempt[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bait feeder food not expiring correctly[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bait feeder crash that could occur when placing unsupported food during specific food requirements[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][b]Animal AI & Combat Updates:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Improved how animals observe and respond to points of interest[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where predators could fail to notice prey[/p][/*][*][p]Refactored animal charge and close-attack behavior[/p][/*][*][p]Bears should now perform close attacks correctly[/p][/*][*][p]Improved attack checks for wolves, bears, boars and goats[/p][/*][*][p]Reduced goat head damage[/p][/*][*][p]Improved animal behavior pacing to reduce overly frequent resting actions[/p][/*][*][p]Animals should no longer flee by turning toward threats[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where goats and boars could get stuck in attack aggro[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could continue targeting dead players or animals[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue that could prevent animals from reacting to players[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could be frightened by other animals that should not be seen as threats[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could fail to detect players or other animals after their perception was reactivated[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][b]Animal Movement & Tracking Updates:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could get stuck after fleeing[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could enter safe zones[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could move toward invalid locations[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where inactive or distant animals could fail to find a valid ground location[/p][/*][*][p]Improved animal movement speed setup[/p][/*][*][p]Added new movement logic to help animals move closer to targets[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed goat footprint trails not appearing[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could collide with the player camera[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][b]Audio, Animation, & Performance Updates:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Fixed cases where inactive or distant animals could still trigger sounds[/p][/*][*][p]Added additional safeguards for animal sounds, including footsteps, to help prevent audio-related performance issues[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted wolf howl volume[/p][/*][*][p]Added a flesh-cutting sound effect[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed various animal animation issues[/p][/*][*][p]Continued performance optimization work, including improvements to animal population performance[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p]This is still an Alpha Playtest, so some behaviours will not be final. Flee behaviour, bait feeder interactions, animal population, and predator response are all areas we are continuing to test and improve.[/p][p][/p][h2][b]CHANGES IN PREVIOUS PUBLIC ALPHA \[JUNE 17TH][/b][/h2][list][*][p]Animal population now updates throughout the in-game day, rather than only updating when day / night changes[/p][/*][*][p]Bait feeders have been updated to work with the new population system, attracting existing animals or spawning a new animal if there are none around to ensure the player is rewarded for using them[/p][/*][*][p]Further iteration on flee behaviour, which should reduce some stuck-animal cases[/p][/*][*][p]Animals can now die correctly while moving between different behaviour states[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several animal death-flow issues, including cases where animals could appear dead but remain standing[/p][/*][*][p]Dead prey animals now attract predators in a similar way to bait feeders, but they won't spawn new animals[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals could spawn in water[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed cases where animals would run into water[/p][/*][*][p]Continued performance optimization work[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0670a35a545ebb175d7641d31cf0f5502f269735.png"][/img][/p][h2][b]JOIN THE FREE-ROAMING ANIMALS PUBLIC ALPHA[/b][/h2][h3][b]Free-Roaming Animals: Public Alpha is now live.[/b][/h3][p align="start"]
Free-roaming land animals need to feel right across the whole island, not just in controlled internal tests. That includes animal density, hunting flow, predator and prey encounters, server performance, and the kind of issues that only show up when more players are out there together.[/p][p align="start"]That’s why we’re opening this build early. You can try the feature before the June update goes live, and your feedback will help us tune how free-roaming wildlife feels before release.
[/p][h3][b]How To Access the Public Alpha[/b][/h3][p align="start"]You can access the Public Alpha through Steam:[/p][olist][*][p]Open your Steam Library[/p][/*][*][p]Right-click SCUM[/p][/*][*][p]Select Properties[/p][/*][*][p]Open the Betas tab[/p][/*][*][p]Select the Public Alpha branch[/p][/*][/olist][p align="start"]Once you are on the Public Alpha branch, join one of the available Public Alpha servers listed below.
[/p][h3][b]Public Alpha Server List[/b][/h3][table equalcells="1" colwidth=","][tr][th][p][b]SERVER NAME[/b][/p][/th][th][p][b]ADDRESS[/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Canada[/p][/td][td][p]51.222.255.64:7042[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 US Central[/p][/td][td][p]79.127.244.247:7042[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 US East[/p][/td][td][p]79.127.223.71:7042[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 2 US East[/p][/td][td][p]79.127.219.101:7082[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Europe[/p][/td][td][p]5.9.115.49:7122[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 2 Europe[/p][/td][td][p]5.9.115.49:7142[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Asia[/p][/td][td][p]15.235.181.208:7082[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Australia[/p][/td][td][p]51.161.198.166:7082[/p][/td][/tr][/table][p align="start"][/p][h3][b]Important Notes[/b][/h3][p align="start"]This is a Public Alpha build, so you may run into bugs, performance issues, balance issues, crashes, or odd animal behaviour.[/p][p align="start"]If you play single-player, please back up your save files before switching branches.[/p][p align="start"]Public Alpha server files will not be available for private server owners. This test is focused on Official Public Alpha servers so the team can collect the logs, crash dumps, and live data before release.
[/p][h3][b]Feedback[/b][/h3][p align="start"]We’ve opened up dedicated Discord channels for [url="https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.com%2Fchannels%2F228656196247093248%2F1514973450563752106"]discussion[/url] and [url="https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.com%2Fchannels%2F228656196247093248%2F1514973450563752106"]reports[/url].[/p][p align="start"]We’ve also pinned a [url="https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.com%2Fchannels%2F228656196247093248%2F1514974266930630776"]structured feedback survey[/url], so you can tell us how the new wildlife feels after spending time with it.[/p][p align="start"]Please keep reporting issues, odd behaviour, performance problems, and anything that feels off while testing.[/p][p]
Free-roaming animals arrive in the full Into The Wild June Update on [b]Monday, June 29th[/b].[/p][p]Thank you to everyone helping us bring free-roaming animals back to the Island.[/p]

items.title: SCUM | June Update Preview: Free-Roaming Animals Return
items.contents:
[h3][b]// UPDATE //[/b][/h3][p][b]The June Into the Wild update is now scheduled for Tuesday, June 30.[/b][/p][p]We’re moving the update by one day so the team can take extra time for final checks and fixes before release.[/p][p]Thanks for your patience. We’ll share the full patch notes when the update is live. 
___[b] [/b][/p][p][b]Hey there, Prisoners![/b][/p][p]Free-roaming animals are coming back to SCUM with the second Into The Wild update, going live on [b]Monday 29th June.
[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a04de33dffc363ac34764da710221fc1226c8a5a.png"][/img]This update continues our run of hunting, fishing, farming, cooking, and wilderness survival changes, with free-roaming wildlife as the focus of this preview.[/p][p]Today, we’re opening a Free-Roaming Animals Public Alpha so players can try the feature early and help us tune it before release. More details on that below.
[/p][h3][b]Important: June's update will include a partial wipe of official servers.[/b][/h3][p]
Character stats and gold will not be wiped. Bases, gear, and supplies on official servers will be cleared, so you can sell off gear and supplies before the update and use that gold again after the wipe. [/p][p]Partial wipes will not be enforced on private servers. Moving forward, our aim is to line official server wipes up with the start of each new themed update cycle.[/p][p]Now, here’s a look at what’s coming! 
[/p][h2][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1d8d6012bc9e789bbb4c1422019ff5dd2eaefb04.png"][/img][/h2][p][/p][h2][b]SETTING THE ISLAND'S WILDLIFE FREE[/b][/h2][p]One of the biggest pieces of work coming in the June update is the return of free-roaming animals to the island. [/p][p]We know how much this matters to players, and to the feel of SCUM. Wildlife makes every journey across the island feel more alive and gives hunting a more natural rhythm. [b][i] [/i][/b][/p][p][/p][carousel autoadvance="true"][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0670a35a545ebb175d7641d31cf0f5502f269735.png"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/bb0b63adbf43ffceb972f9ec2f3b6d32f4f42adf.png"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b1a2b6f5e823b46b95cf4c5ed4dec8db936c21e2.png"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/413d1eb1f62db6ba5d4519bcc4e73081585090b9.png"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/82f04bc27b5bf2ee34da4899a57ff9f4897aa1f0.png"][/img][/carousel][p]
SCUM has had free-roaming animals before but bringing them back properly has meant more than switching the old system on again. [/p][p]The earlier version came with a real server performance cost. Every active animal adds work for the server, alongside players, puppets, vehicles, bases, loot, traps, combat, travel, and everything else happening across the island. As SCUM has grown, that cost has become even more important to solve properly.[/p][p]To support their return, the team has been working to create more server headroom and reduce the load animals place on the server. That means wildlife can exist more naturally across SCUM without putting the same pressure on the server at every distance.
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b0097534c87cbae3ec0fde5c1235ad5735aec895.png"][/img][/p][p]Close to players, animals need the behaviours and reactions that make an encounter feel believable. Further away, they can keep moving through the island in a lighter state, while the server focuses more detail where it matters most. [/p][p]Wildlife should feel like it is already out there, not just appearing when you start a hunt or place bait. That means quiet stretches still matter, alongside distant movement, spotting tracks, and moments where you hear something nearby before you ever see it. 
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ba24bc7d2406c3c2d1c18fbe5ec6454eebfe3831.png"][/img][/p][p]Hunts should start to take more unexpected turns, with prey and predators crossing paths, and carcasses potentially attracting the wrong kind of attention. That mix helps make SCUM’s wilderness feel alive.[/p][p]We’ll share a deeper look when the update goes live, including how the team approached this work.
[/p][h2][b]JOIN THE FREE-ROAMING ANIMALS PUBLIC ALPHA[/b][/h2][h3][b]Free-Roaming Animals: Public Alpha is now live.[/b][/h3][p]
Free-roaming land animals need to feel right across the whole island, not just in controlled internal tests. That includes animal density, hunting flow, predator and prey encounters, server performance, and the kind of issues that only show up when more players are out there together.[/p][p]That’s why we’re opening this build early. You can try the feature before the June update goes live, and your feedback will help us tune how free-roaming wildlife feels before release.
[/p][h3][b]How To Access the Public Alpha[/b][/h3][p]You can access the Public Alpha through Steam:[/p][olist][*][p]Open your Steam Library[/p][/*][*][p]Right-click SCUM[/p][/*][*][p]Select Properties[/p][/*][*][p]Open the Betas tab[/p][/*][*][p]Select the Public Alpha branch[/p][/*][/olist][p]Once you are on the Public Alpha branch, join one of the available Public Alpha servers listed below.
[/p][h3][b]Public Alpha Server List[/b][/h3][table equalcells="1" colwidth=","][tr][th][p]SERVER NAME[/p][/th][th][p]ADDRESS[/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Canada[/p][/td][td][p]51.222.255.64:7042[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 US Central [/p][/td][td][p]79.127.244.247:7042[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 US East[/p][/td][td][p]79.127.223.71:7042[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 2 US East[/p][/td][td][p]79.127.219.101:7082[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Europe[/p][/td][td][p]5.9.115.49:7122[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 2 Europe[/p][/td][td][p]5.9.115.49:7142[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Asia[/p][/td][td][p]15.235.181.208:7082[/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]SCUM Server Official Public Alpha 1 Australia[/p][/td][td][p]51.161.198.166:7082[/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][h3][b]Important Notes[/b][/h3][p]This is a Public Alpha build, so you may run into bugs, performance issues, balance issues, crashes, or odd animal behaviour. [/p][p]If you play single-player, please back up your save files before switching branches. [/p][p]Public Alpha server files will not be available for private server owners. This test is focused on Official Public Alpha servers so the team can collect the logs, crash dumps, and live data before release.
[/p][h3][b]Feedback[/b][/h3][p]We’ve opened up dedicated Discord channels for [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1514973450563752106" buttoncolor="#ed7426"]discussion[/url] and [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1514973450563752106" buttoncolor="#ed7426"]reports[/url].[/p][p]We’ve also pinned a [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1514974266930630776" buttoncolor="#ed7426"]structured feedback survey[/url], so you can tell us how the new wildlife feels after spending time with it. [/p][p]We’re especially interested in how wildlife feels across the island, and anything that feels too frequent, too quiet, too punishing, or not quite right yet.
[/p][h2][b]MORE IN THE JUNE UPDATE[/b][/h2][p]Free-roaming animals are the focus of this preview, but they're not the only thing coming in this update. June will also bring Trophy Fish Wall Mounts, a Hunting Fundamentals task, bug fixes, balance updates, quality-of-life improvements, and more Into The Wild changes.[/p][p]
We’ll share the full patch notes when the update goes live on [b]Monday 29th June.[/b][/p][p]May started this run of updates, June continues it, and July will keep building on it.[/p][p]
See you on the island![/p]

items.title: Hotfix - 1.3.0.2.119181
items.contents:
[p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p]We have another hotfix incoming featuring some very welcome quality of life improvements and bugfixes so make sure to check out what we have in store for you![/p][p] [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/baeea3d2d67fd5e6e4628afe0f6f059b2b46dc20.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]Performance and bug fixes[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where performance would drop and disconnects could occur when opening chest full of guns with attachments[/p][/*][*][p]We also made sure to fix an issue where logging in while you have certain quests active would result in your character loading in naked and subsequent disconnects. Yikes. In any case, you should see significantly fewer disconnects from the game that were caused by quests.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the player's corpse would disappear after respawning in Sandbox mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Takedown and Recurve bows had an offset animation when firing an arrow. It is fixed now![/p][/*][*][p]We fixed an issue where the idle SFX for the deer would play even when the animal is dead if it was killed while the SFX was playing.[/p][/*][*][p]We removed the option for the Hunter's blind to be picked up. The interaction was visible even though it was never intended to be added, so we removed it completely.[/p][/*][*][p]While on the topic of interactions, there was an issue where the ''Remove Current Skin'' interaction did not work on the Woodland Chandelier. It is fixed now![/p][/*][*][p]There was a bug where players could pick up an active animal bait feeder. It is now fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]The Hippie Shirt 02 had a wrong icon attached to it at the General goods trader. Also fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]Trader prices for certain items (such as the Laika and WW vehicles, as well as other vehicle-related items) were way too low. The prices are right now![/p][/*][*][p]Sometimes the character would ragdoll and fall through the terrain when teleporting. No more![/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]Quality of life improvements[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]There was an issue with the sorting inventory option where selecting the “sort by type” option, items would indeed be sorted by their type, but if the player had a lot of different items from the same type, they would all be jumbled. Now, same items of the same type get neatly placed next to one another when you opt to sort them![/p][/*][*][p]Base Building Expansion Kits are now have an unlimited stock at the General goods trader![/p][/*][*][p]We made a change to filling placeable crafting recipes! To explain this, we'll use the Improvised fireplace as an example. Before, when you wanted to craft a fireplace, rags would be offered to be added to the recipe, and there would be no other way to select i.e. tinder even though it could be sitting right next to it. Now, filling the crafting recipe adheres to the following logic:[/p][olist][*][p]Item in hands[/p][/*][*][p]Items that are selected in the inventory/vicinity[/p][/*][*][p]Default item[/p][/*][/olist][/*][*][p]The Woodland DLC items can now be both bought at the trader and crafted using their parent items as base + other items depending what is being crafted. The crafted item inherits durability from the base crafting recipe item at a 1:1 ratio. Trader prices of the Woodland DLC items have been adjusted to their crafting recipe base item for preventing the exploits of crafting and selling them for big profit. Their crafting recipes can be found in the Crafting → Cosmetics → DLC section with their appropriate icons. Also, their buy and sell prices have been fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]We also created a crafting recipe for the DLC Poncho, meaning that it can now be easily obtained through the crafting menu.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]Known issues[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]Also, just wanted to let everyone know that we're very much aware of the issue where player corpses would disappear when the killed player is waiting in the respawn screen, and that this will be fixed with the upcoming update that we'll be releasing later this month![/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Also, we're aware that the hunting task is not working properly, so we decided to remove it altogether and return it with the upcoming update when we get it up and running properly! [/p][/*][/list][p][/p][hr][/hr][p]As always, if you've encountered anything else that requires our attention, please let us know via the following channels: [/p][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]Bug reports forum on Steam[/url] 
[url="https://help.scum.game/"]Official SCUM support[/url][/p][p]See you on the Island![/p]

items.title: SCUM - Community showcase
items.contents:
[h3]Happy Tuesday, Prisoners! Recently, we launched [b][i]Into the Wild[/i][/b], and today we get to see how you handle it firsthand. Sit back and relax, and enjoy some [i]Into the Wild[/i] content.[/h3][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7142b552e321c8cf91c60f8f42c6fe13d0b90588.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/54f99f4c90be93a635ec0a838f7ffa7254b41157.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Glad to see that the farming rebalance worked well for you. [/i]🍀[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3733103351"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0ee8e56c84264a6c06d316922e69137bd5efd280.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]The guide can help you find out which animals live where and how dangerous they are.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3733482933"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/5104bd1f218de29d0e02a0e70a0deb451c0b60ff.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Guys are already feeling at home at our new Hunter’s Grotto.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3732794302"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d52389c1bc6bd8520d24800f8e830dc385c52cc8.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Sunglasses at night make for irreplaceable hunting equipment. [/i]🕶️[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3737212902"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/45eab8b526736f98b77eeb10bb18774baf0f7e97.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Fatal nose boop incoming. [/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3737144188"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ff65ea0a4de1927a0d91e2eafd2dd357b31b561b.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]It’s hard to keep track of the prey when you’re soaking these sights in.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3737041058"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4c37c37404123f73dd64248ba8626b266fcb974e.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Down, boy![/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3736998855"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4d05b7137175913fa03dfe4fc6dede308760af15.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]TV programme nowadays be like…[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3736446574"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d1bf568a13e60d5ba13a58cce6ef6726c66a820f.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Gotta be prepared to season that game![/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3736303784"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/94bce4cde735020848e62fdc051d99701ec252d7.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]You gotta enjoy the simple things in life.[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3734922511"]Link to original[/url] [/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c34e788c0417870fb52531c8652a70cdc22e8faa.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Not really how an ultimate hunter looks like…[/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3734245351"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/74bc461b87c557e6942c71ceb1c5a16ada0c9024.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]Zero survival instinct. [/i]🐻[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3734240879"]Link to original[/url][/p][p][/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/20d2e0585500d6357c7c8cffdd0bf5e87affa8e6.jpg"][/img]
[i]A moment of respite before the thrill of the hunt![/i][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3733708127"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]In this week's [b]YouTube[/b] chronicles, we have a few interesting ones ->[/p][p][/p][p]Watch a wholesome video of [b]Gaming Central[/b] showing off his IRL garden and tending to his in-game plants after the farming rebalance! [/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U7NODwrRL-4"][/dynamiclink][/p][p]If you’re still not sure how the new bait feeder works, [b]ballistic[/b] is here to help you catch your first meat![/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3SVeBW6FzE4"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][b]Dusty[/b] talks about our new update and everything you can see and find firsthand. Go take a look![/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8UT0uEDpXoE"][/dynamiclink][/p][p]Last, but not least - we got [b]Casual Wardog[/b] who forced his friends to play SCUM for the first time - go and see how that went.[/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFYHVG0t4KE"][/dynamiclink][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]That's it for this week, guys, we hope you are actively enjoying the new [b][i]Into the Wild[/i][/b] update![/p][p]See you soon![/p][p]Somke
[/p]

items.title: Hotfix - 1.3.0.1.118271
items.contents:
[p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p]Hot on the heels of the latest update, we’re releasing a hotfix for the most pressing issues you’ve encountered over the past week. You can view the full list of resolved issues and adjustments below. 

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/baeea3d2d67fd5e6e4628afe0f6f059b2b46dc20.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]Connectivity & Server Access[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the max lag check was too aggressive, preventing some players from accessing servers.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where SteamID mismatches could cause connectivity issues for players.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a client crash tied to weapon holsters.[/p][/*][*][p]Temporarily disabled SDSpeechTools while we investigate crashes affecting some older CPUs. SDSpeechTools is a speech-to-text component intended to support future accessibility features. 
It intentionally uses a local model so voice data does not need to be sent to third parties, and is not used to collect or store player voice data.[/p][/*][/list][h3]Quests & Performance[/h3][list][*][p]Reworked the hologram quest object system to reduce the number of network objects. Hologram quest objects now spawn client-side only, with the server checking them when players interact with them.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where trader discounts obtained as quest rewards were not working.[/p][/*][/list][h3]Smoking, Cooking, & Food Balance[/h3][list][*][p]Rebalanced the experience gained from smoking meat, as it was granting too much experience.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where players could remove meat from the smoker and gain the same amount of experience as if it had completed the full smoking process.[/p][/*][*][p]We've increased the overcook time for smoked items. Before, overcooking your meat for just 2 minutes would make it unusable and would despawn it. Now, that overcook time has been increased to 6 real-life hours.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the smoker would lose health when repaired through the flag.[/p][/*][*][p]Smokers can no longer become bad quality and can now always be repaired beyond 50%.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the item was missing from the kitchen basin recipe.[/p][/*][/list][h3]DLC Gear & Trader Adjustments[/h3][list][*][p]Reduced the trader price of the Hunter Bow and set its draw weight to 35.[/p][/*][*][p]Reduced the trader price of the Woodland Quiver, and adjusted its weight capacity and inventory slots - it now matches the Military Quiver.[/p][/*][*][p]Set the Woodland DLC item stock to unlimited at the Hunter trader.[/p][/*][*][p]Reduced the Poncho warmth level from 4 to 1.[/p][/*][/list][h3]Visual & Item Fixes[/h3][list][*][p]Fixed an issue with the arrow socket mismatch on the Woodland Quiver when worn by a female prisoner.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a visual issue on the bait feeder where the front latch could be missing.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the bait feeder would be offset while the character is holding it in their hands.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the metal detector had an incorrect interaction hint for resources, wrongly requiring gasoline.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the metal detector was missing the “Take in hands” interaction when not already held.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where treating an infected wound with alcohol would consume the whole bottle.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an ammo box exploit where selling a 1/30 ammo box to a trader who did not already have that specific ammo box in stock could allow players to buy back a 30/30 ammo box.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where an item placed in a weapon holster would not be visible in the main menu.[/p][/*][*][p]Also fixed an issue where turrets would enter broken audio/animation state after generator power loss followed by powering it up again.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Dinghy could not be properly purchased.[/p][/*][/list][p][b]A quick note on Woodland Hunter items:[/b] they are not craftable in this hotfix, but this is planned for next week’s hotfix. Once that update is live, you’ll be able to craft them and find their recipes in the crafting menu.[/p][p]If you've encountered anything else that requires our attention, please let us know via the following channels:

[url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]Bug reports forum on Steam[/url] 
[url="https://help.scum.game/"]Official SCUM support[/url][/p][p][/p][p]See you on the Island![/p]

items.title: SCUM: INTO THE WILD - May Update | 1.3.0.0.117753
items.contents:
[p][b]Hey Prisoners,

[/b]Last week, we shared more on where [b]SCUM[/b] is heading and introduced [b]Into the Wild[/b], our first focused run of updates. [/p][p]Across May, June and July, Into the Wild is about improving hunting, fishing, cooking, farming, wilderness survival, and the systems connected to them. Some features will arrive sooner than others, because bigger systems take time to build, test and balance, but each monthly update is designed to make that side of SCUM better. [/p][p][b]Today, the May Update is here.[/b]
No server wipe has taken place with this update. [/p][p]This release gives every prisoner new ways to track wildlife, hunt with more control, make better use of the food they find, get more from their crops, and spend more time surviving in the wild.[/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="kpZ6MaC4nxY;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][p][b]Into the Wild Season Stat Bonus[/b][/p][p]To help every prisoner step into the wild, all existing and newly created characters will receive a temporary boost to their Archery and Awareness XP gain for the duration of Into the Wild.[/p][p]Archery helps with bow reload speed and access to stronger bows. Awareness improves your ability to hear animals in Focus Mode and unlocks a compass at the top of your screen at higher levels.[/p][p]Because Into the Wild is focused on hunting, tracking, and wilderness survival, we wanted everyone to feel a little more prepared for that side of SCUM while the season is live.[/p][p]The bonus is active by default throughout the season.[/p][p][/p][h2][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d5f2d88d527d95d2e0c95b5749e7b2ac171255ee.png"][/img][/h2][p][/p][h3][b]Hunter's Grotto[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/fab7eab12a5c57a06fbdabe6b69a9f7ad2e84eec.gif"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/5accfaec1aa9f0991de3170e90eab75c105a18c2.gif"][/img][/p][p]A familiar place just got a lot more interesting. Tucked within the Island's existing outposts, the Hunter's Grotto is a dedicated corner for those who stalk the wilderness for sport, survival, and glory. A curated selection of hunting supplies is now right where you need it - no detour required. [/p][p]It's a gathering point. A place to swap stories with fellow hunters, forge unlikely alliances with strangers, and pick up some of the most challenging quests the Island has to offer. Some hunts are too dangerous to tackle alone - and the Grotto is where you find the people crazy enough to join you.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Animal Trail Generation[/b] [/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0c12978fda27b0a0da4d6cce326cacc3f568dc4c.gif"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/76004758e4b75c8f965fafab28b0329120dd220b.gif"][/img][/p][p]The hunt is getting easier to read! Animals can now leave visible tracks after appearing during a hunt, giving you a trail to follow as you pursue them. For this update, tracks work within the existing hunting system: hunts still begin with hunting clues, then Focus Mode can help reveal an animal’s trail after it appears. Awareness affects how easy those tracks are to read.[/p][p]This is an early step toward one of our bigger goals: bringing animals back across the Island in a future Into the Wild update, supported by a new system built for better performance.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Bait Feeder[/b] [/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e762327e806a8b638937cdd0f48c4d2bc8846d25.gif"][/img][/p][p]Found in hunting towers, shops, and around farmland, or purchased outright, the Bait Feeder is a deployable container you can slot with a single food item to attract animals to a set location. Different bait draws different animals, so knowing what roams your local biome is half the battle. [/p][p]Once placed and loaded, the game checks whether a compatible animal can actually spawn in the area, which means where you set it up matters just as much as what you put inside it. Rather than chasing prey across the map, you can use the Bait Feeder to establish a reliable hunting spot and let the wildlife come to you.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Kill Quality Influences Meat Quality[/b][/h3][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/59f79a08c9bb369b92c4abdede357d6336aeee45.gif"][/img] [/h3][p]The quality of meat and materials you get from a kill now depends on how you take the animal down. In other words, where you hit it, and what you hit it with, now both play a big role. The aim of this system is to reward players who gear up properly and aim carefully. [/p][p]If you want the best yield out of every animal, it pays to consider what you're hunting for and what kind of gear you use for hunting before you pull the trigger (or release your arrow).[/p][p][/p][h2][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f54629624ad07198a42e797676a99dcfa2fe6cad.png"][/img][/h2][p][/p][h3][b]Smoker[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b281f69aea7f1348064c3a841eb39df45c2fece2.gif"][/img][/p][p]Have way too much leftover meat from your last hunt and worried that it'll go bad? [/p][p]Fret not, we've got you covered! The Smoker is a new base building element designed to help you preserve food and stretch your supplies further. Once you fuel it with small wooden logs, sticks, or planks, and light it with a fire starter, you can load it with up to six items at a time and begin the smoking process. Smoked meats last significantly longer than their raw counterparts. [/p][p]Beware, however, as quality matters here too and timing is everything! Leaving something in too long will start degrading it and making it less appetizing. A single base can hold up to five Smokers, and when running, they'll visually show smoke from the top and a faint fire from the stove with an audible crackling to match.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Farming Rebalance[/b][/h3][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7d57eef984495cd9d772ba5d9e3379a7cba35292.gif"][/img][/h3][p]Farming has had a big rework, making it feel less like a chore and more like a genuine survival strategy. Your Farming skill level is now locked in at the moment you plant a seed, meaning the yield you get is determined by how skilled you were when you put it in the ground and not when you come back to harvest. [/p][p]Fruit and other produce are now guaranteed on each cycle rather than being left to chance, and you can see exactly when your plants will be ready by pointing at them in Focus Mode, which displays the remaining growth time. [/p][p]On top of that, the sunlight requirement for optimal growth has been lowered, which means plants in tougher conditions - like cold regions or early morning hours - will now grow closer to their full potential than they used to. Overall, the farming loop has been tightened up to feel less like a waiting game and more like a system worth actually engaging with.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Food Loot Rebalance[/b][/h3][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/36ebb70ad72bc543554e5b6a83b80d65e6ab9873.gif"][/img] [/h3][p]Now that we have introduced (and will continue to introduce) more ways to obtain food through gameplay, we’ve rebalanced how food loot appears across the Island.[/p][p]The goal is to make hunting, fishing, farming, and food preservation more meaningful, rather than letting every location solve your food needs through loot alone. Overall food distribution and spawn rarities have been adjusted across all locations, with many non-survival foods removed from various loot spawners.[/p][p]You will still be able to find ingredients and other food items, but not as many as before.[/p][p]We are also starting to introduce a system that changes the trader economy and makes it depend more on what prisoners are buying and selling. In other words, item availability will be directly tied to the trader’s stock, meaning some items will only be available to purchase if players have previously sold them to that trader.[/p][p]We’ll begin this change with food items, tying it directly to the wider farming, fishing, hunting, and food loot changes. The system will eventually expand to other items, but we’ll talk more about that in later updates.[/p][p][/p][h2][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4a0442115c60c4b9121392ef5d120905ff21f373.png"][/img][/h2][p][/p][h3][b]Dynamic Fish Activity[/b][/h3][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/299c4ed1f664c2bd6c7714bc26ae5a12841bcdf5.gif"][/img] [/h3][p]Fishing has received a significant overhaul, introducing special activity spots scattered across the island's rivers, lakes, and coastal waters that signal their presence through audio and visual cues and offer better odds of landing bigger, species-specific catches. With 98 of these spots spread across the island, there's plenty of ground to cover - but finding an active one will make stumbling upon it worth it! Only 10 of them will be active at any given time. They will not appear on your map, so you'll need to physically explore to find them. If you hear the sound of splashing water or see fish breaking the surface, you will know that you have found one such spot! [/p][p]Every 5 hours, when the server restarts, the active spots rotate to a new set, keeping the best locations fresh and preventing the same spots from being farmed repeatedly. There are a handful of permanently active spots as well, found where rivers meet the sea - but we'll leave it to you to track those down. Note that you will still be able to catch fish at any random location, but your chances to catch something are now reduced. [/p][p]Fish size and weight now directly impact how much inventory space they occupy and how many fillets you can get from them, so a bigger catch has a tangible payoff.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Inventory Auto-sort Functionality[/b][/h3][h3][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f870b68cc1ae5f93c5deb6b3567a31310c49f7ef.gif"][/img] [/h3][p]One of the most requested additions for the inventory rework has finally arrived! From now on, item manipulation has been greatly improved as we have added the option to sort items by type, amount and durability, both from your character's inventory and from other inventories such as chests.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/34f8bfac25bbb5ea3741aea471675e7fe0c81617.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Alongside the free May Update, two optional DLC packs are now available, inspired by Into the Wild.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]Woodland Hunter Pack[/b][/h3][p]Outfit yourself for the hunt with a new collection of hunting-inspired items, including cosmetics, gear, weapon skins, emotes, poses, trophies, and more.[/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4529160/SCUM_Woodland_Hunter_Pack/?beta=0"][/dynamiclink][/p][h3][b]Woodland Furniture Pack[/b][/h3][p]Turn your hideout into something closer to a lodge. Decorate your base with a new collection of furniture and decoration items for prisoners who want their shelter to feel a little more like home.[/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4635190/SCUM_Woodland_Furniture_Pack/?beta=0"][/dynamiclink][/p][p]These packs are optional and separate from the free update content listed above.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1a448956f0b86f7f523cc489f40f36385a019d27.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2fbf949cbb92a7ea500f1992a719f81c53ed736e.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Now, onto server settings, bug fixes, balance changes, and quality-of-life improvements coming to SCUM with this update:[/p][p][/p][h3][b]SERVER SETTINGS[/b][/h3][list][*][p][b]Campaign Skill Boosts[/b]
\[Features] -> FEATURES - SKILLS
scum.EnableSelectedSkillsPromotion=True[/p][p]Enables or disables experience gain boosts for skills related to the current campaign.[/p][/*][*][p][b]Smoker Limits Per Flag Area[/b]
\[Features] -> FEATURES - BASE BUILDING
scum.SmokerMaxAmountPerFlagArea=-1[/p][p]Determines the maximum number of Smokers allowed per flag area.[/p][p]Default: 5
Minimum: 0
Maximum: 10[/p][/*][*][p][b]Smoker Increased Decay Threshold[/b]
\[Features] -> FEATURES - BASE BUILDING
scum.SmokerStartDecayingIfFlagAreaHasMoreThan=-1[/p][p]Determines how many Smokers can be placed in a flag area before they start decaying at an increased pace.[/p][p]Default: 5
Minimum: 0
Maximum: 10[/p][/*][*][p][b]Fishing High Activity Zone Rotation[/b]
\[World] -> WORLD - HUNTING
scum.FishingHighActivityZoneRotationTime=-1.000000[/p][p]Determines the time, in hours, before a new set of fishing high activity zones can be activated. Activation happens on server restart.[/p][p]Default: 5
Minimum: 0
Maximum: 8760[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3][b]EXPLOITS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]Block Explosive Damage to Vehicles setting wasn’t working for certain explosive traps, such as Claymore, Improvised Claymore, Pressure Cooker Bomb, and some Mines, resulting in vehicles taking damage inside the safe zone with the explosive damage setting blocked. Now the setting blocks all explosive damage to vehicles.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a way to fast plant explosives (Frag grenades, TNT) on the Base Building element by canceling the action bar during planting. Instead of canceling the action, the explosive would get instantly planted, which we find highly disruptive, as it was possible to instantly plant huge numbers of explosives.[/p][/*][*][p]Similarly, there was an issue where Cargo drop explosions would still damage and destroy nearby vehicles, even when explosion damage was disabled in server settings. It does not happen anymore. Additionally, we've added a custom zone setting where you can specifically enable/disable cargo drop damage to vehicles.[/p][/*][*][p]You could pick up items from the vicinity while driving inside a vehicle, which gave an unfair advantage over players who are on foot. You could gather fast loot and dropped loot during a fight. Also, you could gather other stuff, including chests and dropping chests, without ever leaving the vehicle. And with the new pickup system that we introduced in the latest update, all functions of this particular action became even more powerful. Now, the items in the vicinity will be greyed out and actions will be disabled while inside of a vehicle, but you can interact and drop items/chests from your or the vehicle's inventory while driving.[/p][/*][*][p]This was a sneaky one. Checking the wind direction while holding a backpack in hands would store it inside the magic pocket, which would free the character’s hands, while also removing the weight penalty. This is no longer the case as the backpack now drops to the ground while checking wind direction.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3][b]AUDIO[/b] [/h3][list][*][p]We fixed an issue where there would be no sound while repairing items with the sewing kit. Now the sound has been added to the repairing animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Miss the crackling sound of fire? Don’t worry. There was a bug where the fire SFX was missing from Fire Ring, Bonfire, and Improvised Fireplace. It has been fixed, and you can enjoy the fireplace again.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where chests full of items would sometimes play a very loud item SFX after opening. It was pretty annoying as it wouldn’t happen every time, so we fixed those inconsistencies.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]When fighting a puppet, its growling and screaming sounds could overlap with the hit sound effects, causing both audio cues to play at the same time and sound duplicated. This has now been fixed.[/p][/*][/list][h3][/h3][h3][b]UI[/b][/h3][list][*][p]There was an issue when the chat console was opened, and if you clicked anywhere except the input box, then closed it, it would not be focused when reopened. This has been fixed, and now the chat console input box is always focused when reopened.[/p][/*][*][p]After buying the Underpants_01 and F_Undershirt_Bra_01 at the General Goods trader, their icon would be displayed incorrectly in the purchased item section. It has been fixed now, and the icons are shown correctly. The same thing happened with Short Pants icons, so we fixed that too.[/p][/*][*][p]You may have noticed that discounted items are not shown at the trader after you completed the Tier 3 Quest "The Big Bang". This issue has been resolved, and now the discount section appears normally.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an annoying issue where pressing anywhere in the inventory UI while holding a fully equipped fishing rod would incorrectly cast the rod instead of ignoring fishing inputs. Now, fishing inputs will only work when you click on an empty part of the screen.[/p][/*][*][p]When placing ingredients for the Grilled Veggie recipe, the interface would always show Bell Pepper regardless of which vegetable type was actually used. This has now been fixed, and the correct ingredient is displayed in the interface.[/p][/*][*][p]The icon for the tequila drink item was displayed differently in the inventory and the vicinity. Now, it shows the same icon everywhere.[/p][/*][*][p]If you have the map opened, pressing ESC will close the map immediately.
[/p][/*][/list][h3][b]WEAPONS[/b][/h3][list][*][p]High-caliber rifles were dealing too much damage to base building elements, creating an imbalance compared to other weapon types. This was especially noticeable with rapid or repeated fire from weapons such as the M1 Garand and SVD Dragunov. The affected weapons include Mosin Nagant, M1 Garand, SVD Dragunov, AWM, and 98k Karabiner. Damage against BB elements has now been reduced and rebalanced.[/p][/*][*][p]We noticed that the SKS Clip would lose ammunition after a server restart so we fixed that and now it does not happen anymore.[/p][/*][*][p]We’ve also found that when you shoot the target at 100m with a caliber sniper, bullets get affected by low wind speed and that changes bullet direction. Since it shouldn’t be that way, we have fixed this and the sniper bullets are no longer affected by low wind at such small distances.[/p][/*][*][p]We found that there was an aim offset when you applied a weapon sight on the improvised handgun. It is now aligned properly. A similar issue occurred with the scope. The scope was incorrectly positioned and oriented in the player’s hands when used unmounted, and could clip through the character’s head while aiming down sights. This has now been fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]The player’s hand was clipping back through the Trench Gun when using the P17 Bayonet. This issue has now been fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]Strange light reflections would appear while looking through a scope lens at elevated locations at 8 PM in-game time. The reflection should appear as a bright spot, and it should not cover almost the entire scope lens, which was the case here. Now it’s been fixed. [/p][/*][*][p]The Vampyr scope had an issue where a black border appeared around the inner optical lens while ADS. This has now been fixed, and the inner lens is now clean without any border.[/p][/*][*][p]We fixed an issue where aiming with a bow while crouching would dislocate the character's hand.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue with turning on or off the weapon flashlight with the keybind while in first person. Sometimes it would work if the flashlight was operated manually first. But nonetheless, it’s fixed now.[/p][/*][*][p]While in the main menu, the pistol stored in the pistol holder would not be visible. It has been fixed, and the pistol is now showing in the holster while in the main menu. [/p][/*][*][p]We've found that 7.62x39 crap ammo does not do enough damage to the dropship. For instance it took 31 regular bullets of that caliber to down the dropship, while more than 100 crap bullets were not enough. It has been rebalanced now and it takes fewer bullets to down it. While we're on the topic of the dropship, there were some base building elements that were immune to its damage. No more![/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3][b]OTHER[/b][/h3][list][*][p]We have removed the interdependencies among quest givers, meaning that all traders now have T1 quests unlocked right from the start.[/p][/*][*][p]We've fixed an issue where the max ping limitation was not working. Now that it's up and running, we've set the default max ping value to 400, but you can modify that value to a lower or higher one if you want to.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an ICMP issue that was causing a lot of connectivity problems with the server.[/p][/*][*][p]Some of the white clothing material used to reflect light, causing it to "glow" under direct light. This issue affects clothing items that are white or contain white-colored sections. This has been fixed, and now your whites are just white, no glow.[b] [/b]Similarly, while other bra items match their colors with underpants, F_Undershirt_Bra_01 appears grey instead of black, so we fixed it to match.[/p][/*][*][p]The prisoner’s clothes no longer get dirty while driving in a vehicle.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where either allowing or blocking the "Vehicle parking" custom zone setting would affect the "Flag overtake" setting instead. It is fixed now.[/p][/*][*][p]No more free base repairs! We fixed a bug where repairing all base elements by the flag repair would use only 1 Toolbox use, instead of 1 Toolbox use per 1 base element.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where the Kroks level-of-detail textures would aggressively degrade when moving slightly away from them. That is also fixed and it is no longer as egregious as it used to be.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where treating an infected wound with alcohol would consume the entire bottle instead of just a single use. Using alcohol to treat infected injuries should now only consume one use (or 50g of liquid). [/p][/*][*][p]Cooked food items that were prepared before the latest update did not display nutrient values when hovered over with the cursor. This issue has now been fixed, and all cooked food items correctly show their nutrient values again.[/p][/*][*][p]Also, there was an issue where using lower-quality ingredients in cooking does not have an effect on the nutritional values of the final meal. This would result in meals with perfect nutritional values despite using lower-quality ingredients. This is now fixed and now the quality of ingredients affect the quality of the final meal![/p][/*][*][p]The Armorer had multiple Ghillie suit items sharing the same display name, including Ghillie_Suit_Pants_01, Ghillie_Suit_Pants_02, and Ghillie_Suit_Pants_04, as well as Ghillie_Suit_Jacket_01, Ghillie_Suit_Jacket_02, and Ghillie_Suit_Jacket_04. This has now been fixed, and each item is correctly named. [/p][/*][*][p]Memory modules could be found in the vicinity, but would not drop when examining boxes where they were intended to spawn, even with adjusted loot settings. This issue only occurred in multiplayer and has now been resolved.[/p][/*][*][p]The male organ has now received pubic hair in Character creation. [/p][/*][*][p]Holding a flare in hand would cause the character’s hand to become visually disfigured in third-person view. This issue has now been fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]Players who were a little too quick on the “F” key could accidentally restart the “Remove Weed” immediately after finishing them, even when there was nothing left to do. This would trigger an extra action that didn’t actually do anything. The issue has now been resolved.[/p][/*][*][p]There was a bug that made Improvised Water Container come out of crafting already full, as if someone had kindly pre-filled them. This has now been corrected, so you’ll need to find your water the proper way.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the liquid quantity bar incorrectly appeared empty on full bottles after relogging.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where the different lamps, when turned on, would have their light dimmed and barely visible. Now they shine bright![/p][/*][*][p]We noticed that crafting a Practice Bomb would consume an entire Car Battery instead of only using the required amount of charge. This has now been fixed, and the recipe correctly uses five charges from the battery rather than the whole item.[/p][/*][*][p]When an NPC was killed, their bodies weren’t despawning properly. If you moved out of range, they would disappear visually, but were still tracked by the #ShowArmedNPCsLocation command. Over time, this also led to server errors. It’s been resolved now.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where the Gas Lamp and a Wall-Mounted Gas Lamp would display dislocated flame after applying Eastern skin to them and vice versa. It has been fixed, and the flames are now placed at their designated spots. Let there be light! We fixed an issue where lamps would appear turned off after applying a skin, even though they were actually turned on.[/p][/*][*][p]Gear colors in Brawl and MMA events were showing up incorrectly as orange instead of the usual black or white. This has now been fixed, and the gear colors display properly again. [/p][/*][*][p]Apparently, lighting a cigarette using the oven would cause the oven to be destroyed. This weird issue is now fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]The Bass fish animation would break after catching the fish while the keep or release minigame was still active, causing the fish to clip through the player’s hand. This has now been resolved.[/p][/*][*][p]All bayonets currently have the description “short bayonet for xy”. Since this is inaccurate, as some bayonets are not short by definition and can be almost half a meter in length, we have decided to remove the word ‘’short’’ from the bayonet descriptions.[/p][/*][*][p]Multiple level design fixes in the form of fences clipping through walls and misplaced spawners in Z2 sector.[/p][/*][*][p]We fixed an issue where animal head on a spike items (e.g. boar head on a spike, donkey head on a spike, and other animal variants) could not be placed when used on base building foundations.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where characters could perform chopping actions while holding a two-handed axe and lying down. No more![/p][/*][/list][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0a9e94f28f7168a7c152c39eeea5f304f759d98b.png"][/img][/p][p]That’s it for the May Update!

Into the Wild starts here, but it doesn’t end here. The June and July updates will keep pushing further into the survival systems at the heart of this season.

As always, thank you for playing, reporting issues, breaking things in ways we didn’t expect, and sticking with us as SCUM keeps moving.[/p][p][/p][p]See you on the Island![/p]

items.title: SCUM: INTO THE WILD - Looking Ahead
items.contents:
[p]Hey there prisoners! [/p][p]We have some big news for everyone who hold SCUM near and dear to their heart! 

With [b]Into the Wild[/b], we’re grouping our next three monthly updates around one shared focus: hunting, fishing, cooking, wilderness survival, and the systems connected to them. 

[b]Into the Wild [/b]will run from May to July, with each monthly update bringing new features, bug fixes, quality of life improvements, balance changes, and reworks to existing systems tied to the season’s theme. Some things will arrive sooner than others, because bigger systems take time to build, test, and balance, but our aim is simple: every month should move that part of SCUM forward.

[b]The first Into the Wild update goes live on Monday 25th May.

[/b]Before we go into the details on the May update, we want to make one thing clear: [b]THERE WILL NOT BE A WIPE with May's update! 

[/b][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e9861d9501b5dbbdebf6b8f348ba14e64f3c6a94.jpg"][/img]
Now, let’s answer a few things we’ve already seen prisoners asking about [b]Into the Wild[/b]:[/p][p][/p][p][b]Does Into the Wild have a season pass?[/b][/p][p]No. Into the Wild doesn’t have a season pass or battle pass. The May update, and following monthly updates, are free for all players. When we say season, we mean the next group of updates, and right now, it’s hunting season!

[b]Will everything arrive in the May update?[/b][/p][p]No. May is the first Into the Wild update, not the whole season in one patch. More features, fixes, balance changes, and improvements will arrive in June and July.

[b]Why focus on hunting, fishing, and wilderness survival?[/b][/p][p]These systems are a core part of SCUM, and players have given us plenty of feedback on how they can be improved. Into the Wild lets us build on that side of the game across multiple updates, while future seasons will cover other areas of SCUM.

[b]Is this just new content, or are existing systems changing too?[/b][/p][p]Both. Each update will include new additions alongside reworks and improvements to existing systems tied to the season’s theme.

[b]Will there be bug fixes too?[/b][/p][p]Yes. Bug fixes and quality of life improvements are part of each monthly update. We’ll share the full list when the patch notes go live.


With that covered, here’s a sneak peek at what you can expect from the upcoming update:[/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][h3]Animal trail generation
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/99e10a7cf6b9fbb2f0fd0955281630c59e23fba8.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The existing hunting minigame will be a thing of the past! Animals now leave physical trails in the world that you can follow and read - but how well you can see them depends on your Awareness skill.[/p][h3]
Hunter's Grotto
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/464e97b466f81570fdf485a68220d053ff324796.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The all new spot that you can find in Trader outposts where you will be able to purchase hunting provisions, as well as take on new hunting related quests![/p][p][/p][h3]Bait feeder
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4528aea620472223d04e697e9d4760ee09cbc6ae.jpg"][/img][/p][p]A deployable item you can loot or purchase, which you can load with different food items as bait that attracts specific animals to a specific location.[/p][p][/p][h3]Smoker
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/696ba3f8f3ca0fa34b980634a2990029fb106cdb.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The Smoker is a base building element that lets you cure and smoke various meats with minimal ingredients, dramatically extending their shelf life and turning raw survival into something that actually feels sustainable.[/p][p][/p][h3]Type of kill influences meat quality
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b70fc78cf02eca56c3680c6bd632400607ac9271.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The way you take down an animal directly affects the quality of the meat it yields, meaning that going in guns blazing might fill your inventory with something far less useful than a clean, calculated kill would.[/p][p][/p][h3]Farming rebalance
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d53a6f968490068c7452e1dccc35b8c404b13ecc.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Growth times have been shortened, yields are now tied directly to your Farming skill level, and the overall loop has been tightened to be more intuitive and rewarding.[/p][p][/p][h3]Dynamic Fish Activity
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/bcb442759612f89df8be38b81b1c237f27068444.jpg"][/img][/p][p]More fishing spots, new audio and visual cues, and fish size and weight now directly affect how much inventory space they take up and how many fillets you can carve out of them.[/p][p][/p][h3]Inventory auto sort functionality
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c4ea55bc5303866464c7ad1d49a9734e39db3437.jpg"][/img][/p][p]We have added the option to sort items by type, amount and durability, both from your character's inventory and from other inventories such as chests. 
[/p][h3]Food loot rebalance
[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b71b3a0dfe402d88e3712d65aa934826b020375e.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Food loot distribution, as well as spawn rarities, have been heavily rebalanced across all locations, with many non-survival foods removed from various loot spawners.[/p][h3]
Other bugfixes and QoL improvements[/h3][p]More info on those when the patch goes live![/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p] [/p][p]This is just a taste of what you can expect from the upcoming patch. We'll go in-depth on all the changes that will find their way into the game on release day. We'll be dropping some sneak peeks via our socials, so make sure to check those out! 

See you next week![/p]

items.title: SCUM: A New Chapter Begins
items.contents:
[p]Hello, prisoners. [/p][p]Over the past few months, many of you have had questions about what Gamepires joining the Splash Damage Group means for the future of SCUM. [/p][p]Bringing two teams together around a live game takes a lot of coordination behind the scenes, and throughout that process we’ve been working closely to shape our plan for SCUM’s next chapter.  [/p][p]We know you’ve been waiting to hear more, and now that work is far enough along, we want to be more direct about where things stand and where we’re heading next.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2af073bbd45382ff4ed1b0950327c5f5e04fbf2c.jpg"][/img] [/p][h3][b]THE FUTURE OF SCUM[/b][/h3][p]
SCUM is a game with a dedicated community, a world all its own, and a huge amount of potential. We’re working together to support its future and help it become everything we believe it can be. [/p][p]Gamepires remains fully focused on SCUM and on continuing the vision that has shaped the game so far. Splash Damage is here to strengthen development with additional expertise and resources where they can have the biggest impact.  [/p][p]Together, we’re building on the strengths already at the heart of SCUM and helping push the game forward.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/76f3734703c51db2135e31d8ed043b3eb6f70cab.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]“For anyone getting to know Splash Damage through SCUM, we’re a studio with a long history in multiplayer and live game development. After spending some real time playing, it didn’t take long for us to see just how special this game is.[/i] [/p][p][i]SCUM already has something really rare. It has depth, tension, freedom, and a strong sense of identity.[/i] [/p][p][i]That’s a huge part of why we’re excited to be working with Gamepires on it. SCUM deserves to be seen by more players, and the players already here deserve to see that depth continue to grow.[/i] [/p][p][i]For us, this is about helping SCUM build on what already makes it great, sharpening and strengthening the experience, and helping more people discover everything it has to offer.[/i] [/p][p][i]This summer feels like the start of something important for SCUM, and we can’t wait to show you more.”[/i] [/p][p align="right"][/p][p align="right"][b]Dominic Butler, Studio Design Director at Splash Damage[/b][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/35f3a82528b4ff2ac11041a2fb07c917269260e0.jpg"][/img][/p][p][i]“The goal is simple. Keep building on the things that make SCUM special, while improving the areas we know players want us to keep pushing. [/i] [/p][p][i]Working with Splash Damage gives us more support in key parts of development and helps us move that work forward with more focus behind it.[/i] [/p][p][i]We also know that focus has to show up in the quality of the updates themselves. Players should feel that progress when a patch lands, and raising that standard is part of the work ahead.[/i] [/p][p][i]What matters most is that we are aligned on where SCUM is going, and that we’re building on what is already there to help the game continue to grow.[/i] [/p][p][i]That work is already underway, and we’re excited for players to start seeing it.”[/i] [/p][p align="right"][/p][p align="right"][b]Ivan Švarc, Art Director & Co-founder at Gamepires[/b] [/p][p][/p][h3][b]WHAT’S COMING NEXT[/b][/h3][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/fd9dd1c861718a4293946e55ce4093be537d3544.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Over the next few months, SCUM will head [b]Into the Wild[/b], a themed season centred on hunting, wilderness, and survival. [/p][p]Each month, we’ll be bringing an update around that theme, with new features, content, and gameplay improvements, alongside ongoing bug fixes and balance work. [/p][p]We know the community wants to see progress across many areas of SCUM. Some of that work will take longer to tackle than others, but we believe this is a strong step in the right direction. [/p][p][b]Into the Wild[/b] is our first focused season, built to improve and expand a key area of the game across multiple updates. Beyond this summer, you can expect a similar seasonal approach, with stronger themes and a clearer sense of what each stretch of development will deliver. [/p][p]The first update arrives next week, and we’ll have more to share very soon.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/8e4ca9c16af9b9fd301c094298621965d2a1a6b0.jpg"][/img][/p][p]In the meantime, prisoners, try not to die before it drops! [/p][p][b]Gamepires x Splash Damage[/b] [/p]

That's it for this week, see you next!

Somke[/p]

items.title: Hotfix - 1.2.3.2.115523
items.contents:
[p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a3c4fc8ecc3fe0331b1c56d97a4f5cc65dc3c942.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p][/p][p]We’ve seen your feedback about mods breaking after the latest patch, so we’re putting out a quick hotfix to get them working again. Due to certain security measures, unofficial .pak files can currently only be placed in subfolders of SCUM\\Content\\Paks\\ [/p][p][/p][p]There is also a fix for some puppet spawning issues.[/p][p][/p][p]We're aware of the performance issues caused by opening chests with a lots of weapons with attachments, we're working on this and we'll have a hotfix for it very soon! [/p][p][/p][p]Stay tuned for more info on the next update![/p][p][/p][p]The Gamepires team[/p][p][/p][p][/p][p][/p]
