items.title: Hotfix - 1.2.3.1.114625
items.contents:
[p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a3c4fc8ecc3fe0331b1c56d97a4f5cc65dc3c942.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p]We're coming in hot with a fresh new hotfix to iron out some of the issues that popped up with the latest patch![/p][p]Check it out! [/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][list][*][p]First up - DLSS now works properly, and you can now see appropriate visual and performance changes when shifting through different modes. One related issue that was also fixed is the weapon blur that would detach from weapons when aiming down the sights.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where you weren't able to put liquid containers with consumables such as milk or vegetable oil in the fridge.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Also, we fixed an issue where clothes painting was not working at all, even though the context menu showed the option to ''Clear paint'' and the use count is reduced accordingly.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed an issue where the workbench would get destroyed when repairing a sharp tool or weapon.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was also a small visual issue where the Soy sauce item would leave a gray mesh on the ground when taken in hands. While on this topic, there was also a bug where the color of the soy sauce liquid, as well as other liquids, was not the same as the color of the liquid in its icon. Now, they all show their true colors![/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed a bug where you were unable to transfer fuel from a gas lantern to a vehicle or another bottle.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was also an issue where you were unable to drag and drop an SKS clip to the ground. It is a thing of the past now. While on the topic of the SKS, there was a weird issue where an extra bolt sound could be heard when reloading a bullet. We also found that the improvised flashlight was incorrectly positioned on the rifle, which was fixed, as well.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Also, there was an issue where the character's face was blurred in the Barber edit menu when the Depth of Field graphic setting is turned on.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've also received reports that the '#ShowFlagLocations true' command would generate the message for a completely different command. That was fixed as well.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue with the dirtiness level of the quivers where they appeared... way too dirty. The issue was fixed, and dirtiness on quivers is now displayed as intended.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed an issue where vehicles would take damage from explosive bolts and arrows even though vehicle damage would be disabled in the server's custom zone settings. There was also a similar issue where vehicles would take collision damage when ramming into base building elements even with vehicle damage turned off completely.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a bug where cleaning a weapon would use a whole stack of rags instead of just one. That is fixed now.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We found an exploit where the source of the issue was the fact that fish bait crafting would scale with fish weight, which would allow players to obtain more uses from heavier fish. Each use can be converted into one bait, meaning larger fish yield disproportionately high amounts of bait. This creates an exploit where players can farm large fish, convert them into excessive amounts of bait, and then sell the bait for profit. No more![/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was also an exploit involving blast caps where, with advanced demolition skills, the material requirement to craft "Blast caps" is very low. You can buy all materials at the trader's to craft the blast caps, and sell them and make more profit than you have invested.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed a bug in which the cannabis bud didn't have uses.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We have restored the missing world-spawned Lathe Machine and Drill Presses which were unintentionally destroyed due to a previous bug. Please note that this should only affect original world-spawned entities, not player-built ones.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an unfortunate issue where all player base locations were shown in the game client's log. That was removed, and it no longer shows their locations.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We also fixed an issue where the character would lose all of their clothes after dying in an explosion.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed an issue where the client would crash when another player would decontaminate items at a well nearby.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where Isopropyl alcohol's use count doesn't decrease after using it to disinfect Rags, which is now successfully fixed.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where explosions from Sentry grenades deal no damage, which is now a thing of the past.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a stray sound effect which could be heard when eating food. It is removed now.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Shotgun slug ammo had a problem where it would deal inconsistent damage. It now deals intended damage.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where the "weight per consume" of pills isn't defined, causing the player consume the whole item in a single use.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a weird issue where the game window would lose focus after pressing Tab and would cause the player to stop moving and the PC cursor to appear. That's no longer happening.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We also fixed an issue with the SKS where you were unable to fully reload the rifle if you fired only one bullet. That is also fixed.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Additional updates were made to the violation manager.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a small issue with the Vampyr scope where the ocular lens cover would not cover the entire screen. This was changed, and now it covers more screen space.[/p][/*][*][p]We fixed a bug where you were unable to refuel the Improvised flamethrower. The 'Add fuel' interaction was clickable but it did nothing. Not anymore![/p][/*][*][p]We also fixed a bug where the hair would appear too reflective and would not look right. [/p][/*][*][p]To top it off - we also fixed an issue where food cooked before the update showed no nutrient value after the update. It now appears as it should! [/p][/*][/list][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]As always, please let us know if you find anything else, either via our [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/444218299417624587"]Discord[/url] server for bug reports or via our dedicated [url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]bug reports[/url] Steam subforum.[/p][p][/p]

items.title: April patch is officially live! (1.2.3.0.113582)
items.contents:
[p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2baa94806a308da9d7c55c9dd2d5c13e678e406a.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Hey there prisoners,[/p][p][/p][p]We've just released our second monthly patch! Let's not beat around the bush and let's dive right into it. We hope you'll enjoy what we've prepared for you! [/p][p][/p][h2]THE BIG ONES[/h2][p][/p][h3]THE TRENCH GUN[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c529cbcddec71a19475cb4abdfc4260d97999f00.gif"][/img][/p][p]The terrifying and notorious Trench Gun is making a grand appearance in SCUM. Historically, this weapon of war was so devastating that there was an attempt to ban it, as it was argued that it brings unnecessary harm and damage to those unlucky enough to survive its blast. Famous for its slam-fire that allows those who wield it to dispatch their enemies with insane efficiency, it is the ideal weapon for those that want to solve their disputes from up close. To put it simply - it's the last thing you want to see someone carrying in close quarters.[/p][p][/p][h3]THE SKS[/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3c0842ceeb7c9fb73d6fea38d8345c49b8bbffd4.gif"][/img][/p][p]Hailed as the people’s carbine before it was substituted by the ever-popular AK47, the SKS was one of the testaments to Soviet capability to produce reliable and versatile weaponry. The SKS is a rifle for true aficionados of firearms - durable, built with quality materials, and above all - deadly! Those who want a reliable mid-range, semi-automatic firearm, as well as a penchant for Soviet-era weaponry, will find the SKS a no-brainer![/p][p][/p][h3]LANDSCAPE LIGHTING OVERHAUL[/h3][p]For version 1.0, we developed our own technology to achieve realistic indoor lighting affordably. Now, we are upgrading that same tech to boost realism across the entire island. The biggest change is in the ambiance, where we’ve improved ambient occlusion and reflections. Even though UE4 lacks Lumen, we’ve managed to make all models look "grounded" with accurate colors and environmental reflections, technically without any performance hit.[/p][p]
With these changes, we also made the bunkers darker and narrowed the light beam of flashlights to create a more frightening and claustrophobic atmosphere.[/p][p][/p][p]For those that haven't seen, here are some before and after screenshots, with the first being before the lighting overhaul, and the second being after it:[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1c8c85d500f4975e296ed9f214ef0bf72758724b.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/de50bd1f4f1728fbabc77bfb51ad805e92c1a5d9.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7c1380415e4cd691a7672b966c881d542831ba76.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7246fe9f28a1ad97b5ad970f22109270a6fb7f0f.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/6671aa0c04e6ce388714346133dabf7f29eb2107.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/93bad58fca53dbdfe8f370270ca887e373943b0a.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p]If the screenshots aren't enough for you, we've also created a video showcasing these lighting improvements so make sure to check it out:[/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zkhHHl1mQQ0"][/dynamiclink][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]When we're on the topic of lighting, we've also improved the look of night vision to make it look less 'milky'. Here are the before and after images:

[b]Before - Gamma set to 2.0[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0e9ced71cf6bb7eeb7f003daa90b24d03c7fb8ab.jpg"][/img][/p][p][b]Before - Gamma set to 2.4[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f9030538f249e149d44c9c46eac0a37559c5aa1a.jpg"][/img][/p][p][b]Before - Gamma set to 2.8[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/85901c47e7a2d12133516abe2612308f0d5a544b.jpg"][/img][/p][p][b]After - Gamma set to 2.0[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d6dc998b7cbde91e305a72033d1f4b660dbdfc9a.jpg"][/img][/p][p][b]After - Gamma set to 2.4[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/53957a5500e0e75d8ecfc7d190ec6488a90aebac.jpg"][/img][/p][p][b]After - Gamma set to 2.8[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b9ceffffabb864fe6ff2157fa19f4ba2c66b830e.jpg"][/img][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][h3]PICK UP ALL / DROP ALL[/h3][p]A continuation of the inventory rework that we first introduced at the end of last year, we have introduced a more streamlined and user-friendly way to manipulate and move items between the player, the vicinity, and the loot containers.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/de3cbf9748eb74a478c471ee50b0e29f0364afdb.gif"][/img][/p][p]
For instance, you find a bunch of different items lying on the floor near you. Looks like a classic trap, but you are hungry and desperate, and you hope that you’ll find some food. Now, instead of manually looking through all the items and picking them up one by one, you can sort out only the food items and then simply press a button to pick them all up. It’s that simple. Two mouse clicks instead of tens of them or more. Less time out in the open and exposed for someone else to claim your stuff.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7bd901205ce4759811ec97fee1d989d5a8399e86.gif"][/img][/p][p]
As we have stated in the announcement for the patch, the option to either pick up all or drop all also works for lootable containers, meaning that with a single press of a button you can either store everything in your inventory or drop everything into your vicinity.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/500f78a0aa36b655534d30b40f677a01cf58c178.gif"][/img][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/69499838dddb1b62e02d11a8cda857ed3987b96d.gif"][/img][/p][p]
Naturally, the question arises whether this also extends to chests and clothing items, or in other words, basically all containers that are not examine containers. Currently, this is a work in progress and we weren't able to implement it for this patch because we ran into some performance issues, meaning that the time is not yet right for this, but we’ll make sure to add those in the future.[/p][p][/p][h3]STACKING FOOD ITEMS AND INGREDIENTS[/h3][p]Also a continuation of the aforementioned inventory rework, use stacking has now been expanded to cooking items and ingredients! Have one 2/10 and one 5/10 flour? Now you can combine it into one single 7/10 item! While that doesn’t sound exciting at face value, those that want to keep things tidy, organized, and easier to handle know how big of a deal this change is.Also, this same change applies to canned food items as well![/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/23e4b87a6c4367bf5f6513cea459988a73497d01.gif"][/img][/p][p]Also, you can now stack cooking ingredients directly from the cooking UI! Just add your partially used ingredients and they will stack in the recipe immediately![/p][p]
Because of this change, we have also implemented a system where the eating action is driven by the eating animation, meaning that there is no more uncertainty whether less or more uses of the food item have been consumed. Instead, when your character takes a bite, this means that a single use of the food has been consumed.[/p][p]
[/p][h2]QUALITY OF LIFE CHANGES[/h2][list][*][p]We have adjusted the ‘grams per consume’ and food usage values. Beforehand, an entire cooked meal or a large food item had a single use, regardless of its overall weight. It makes more sense to divide these meals into multiple uses. For instance, we have assigned 150g for a single use of some foods, meaning that something that weighs 1.2 kilos will have 8 uses. Other smaller food items such as garlic have also been adjusted to reflect these changes. The weight of a single use of food is contextual, meaning that different food items will have different weight values for their respective single uses.[/p][p]Additionally, ingredients with lower quality values will result in meals with lower final nutrition when cooking. Previously, lower-quality ingredients would still produce meals with perfect nutritional values.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Liquids are now finally… liquid! The material for liquid items has now been changed and they will now simulate how liquids actually behave. In short, you will now see liquid levels shift inside the bottle when used, and they will realistically pour out of their containers. Previously, liquid items had uses, but now we have replaced those with a UI element which tracks the level of fullness of a liquid container such as a bottle and have added an animation for removing and placing bottle caps. To top it off, your beer can now foam up![/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/dab4b8bd76234ec943ffd1ef9ef551672b980836.gif"][/img][/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We have added the option for battery-to-battery charging for cars! Make sure that both your cars (or just car batteries) are near each other, click on both, and pick the option to charge the empty car battery.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We’ve added informative text popups for all interactions that can be disabled for some gameplay reason. Remember the ‘Eat’ interaction being disabled because you have a mask on? Now, when you press on ‘Eat’, you will be prompted to remove your mask so you can successfully complete that interaction. This is mostly aimed towards new players to help them understand why some actions cannot be conducted. You can find the full list of interactions and their respective text popups [url="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1XApDsQepaUAY24fN7YXGVdDjsrfQkAFfKMgMrBTxZL0/edit?gid=0#gid=0"]here[/url].[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Quite possibly the biggest quality of life change of all is definitely the server value logic explanations. It’s no secret that beforehand, server settings values were neither visible nor explained, thus making the process of setting up your server a tedious task of trial and error. Now, each server setting that isn’t a simple ON/OFF option will have both minimum, default, and maximum values described in the tooltips for each server setting, making it much easier for players to understand what they might need to either decrease or ramp up.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The loot in the secret bunkers has been significantly buffed! We have found that the secret bunkers were not worth the effort, as the loot you would receive would not provide enough incentive in terms of valuable items. Now, you will be able to acquire the most powerful explosives and firearms in the game![/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Items created via crafting now auto-merge with identical items in the vicinity.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Want to take the edge off? Now you don’t have to worry about using too much of your weed to get high in-game. We reduced the amount of cannabis required to craft a joint and the amount of tobacco required to craft rolled tobacco. [/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]USER INTERFACE[/h2][list][*][p]Context menu now opens on the bottom right of your cursor, and it has also been reduced in size by 15%.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Base building lamps no longer have the option to be picked up in the context menu.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Male prisoners can no longer equip the high heel shoes clothing item.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We updated the inventory icon for the Police Stabproof Vest to better reflect its visuals when placed on the prisoner.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We have added a small element within clothing icons indicating that the item becomes of bad quality if it falls below 20% durability, meaning that it cannot be repaired beyond 50%. There were exploits where players could have 20% durability pants, repair them to 50%, and then craft a Twitch Drop pants item which you can then repair to 100% durability. Now, that bad quality icon is persistent on that clothing item, which will prevent that item from ever getting above 50% durability.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The scrolling speed within menus has been increased.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We have implemented the ability to assign multiple items of the same class to quick access slots and to assign a single item to multiple QA slots. For instance, now you can place a single apple on multiple quick access slots or multiple apples onto multiple slots. Holstered items can now also be placed into the quick access slots.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The context menu has been streamlined for the ‘Apply Skin’ interaction. The interaction now has its own submenu that shows available options when you hover over it.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The dildo arrow icon is now pointing the right way. As if there is a right or a wrong way…[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The Magnifying Glass icon in the Details section was too zoomed in and had a visible cut on the side, so we made it look crisp again.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Items assigned to both Quick Access and Holster slots tend to be forgotten from Quick Access after relogging. This issue has now been resolved, and your designated items are not going to disappear from those slots after relogging.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The placed base building blueprint widget had multiple UI visual issues, which have now been fixed, including properly aligning the title and removing an unnecessary outline from the widget.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where an invisible cursor would persist on the screen after exiting the ATM via the ESC button, causing the player to get stuck. Now it’s resolved, and after exiting the ATM, the cursor disappears, and movement is restored normally.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where item icons would morph when dragging and dropping them into the hands slot.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Tired of pressing ESC for it to automatically close all the widgets and go straight to opening the pause menu? Won’t happen anymore. Pressing ESC now closes just the widgets that are open, and you will have to press ESC again if you want to go to the pause menu.[/p][/*][/list][p]

[/p][h2]SERVER SETTINGS[/h2][list][*][p]We added a global base element decay rate to server settings, as well as decay rate configuration for custom zones. You can find it in Features -> Base Building -> Base elements decay rate multiplier or in the serversettings.ini file as scum.BaseElementsDecayRateMultiplier=1.000000. This setting multiplies the default rate of base decay (672h). [/p][p]Setting ''0'' will disable decay. Anything greater than ''1'' will have a faster decay, while anything fewer than ''1'' will have slower decay.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We also added a feature for logging current network objects, which you can find in Features -> Misc -> EnableNetworkObjectsLog and in the serversettings.ini file under scum.EnableNetworkObjectLogging=False.[/p][p]Enabling this setting may slightly reduce server performance, but it is useful for diagnosing network object leaks that some servers are experiencing. Unless such a leak is expected or being investigated, it is recommended to keep this setting disabled.[/p][/*][/list][p] The log will be located in the following folder: SaveFiles->Logs->network_objects[/p][p]
[/p][h2]EXPLOITS[/h2][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where it would be possible to ignite flares unlimited times. Now flares are not stackable and have a limited number of uses.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Remember how some players would ram into your car in PvE and destroy it even though the Vehicle Damage server setting was set to Block? That can’t happen anymore, as vehicle damage is now properly blocked by the custom zone settings, which are now actually expanded and divided into more subsettings that can be individually modified and which you can view below:[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/57b151dff13af28e3367be040592012a01d6c764.png"][/img][/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the shotgun would fail to malfunction properly, allowing players to load more shells and continue firing immediately.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where it would be possible to place locks on houses, containers, and buildings located inside Points of Interest. This allowed players to restrict access to world-owned structures that are not intended to be claimable and stop loot from spawning inside.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where players could bypass the visibility and awareness limitations of tear gas and smoke grenades by relogging. This has been resolved, and smoke and tear gas visual and sound effects now persist correctly after relogging while the effect is still active.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]SOUND[/h2][list][*][p]This one is surely going to be one of the more popular ones. The wind sound while driving a vehicle will be made more subtle and will not be as prevalent as before.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We have added a sound effect for weapon disassembly.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Walking on a brick base building floor used to have incorrect sound, so we matched the sound to the visual appearance of a solid, cemented brick surface, which now has a firmer and quieter footstep sound.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]ANTI CHEAT[/h2][list][*][p]The Violation Manager has received additional updates to better detect cheating behavior. Not going into specifics here for obvious reasons.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]LEVEL DESIGN[/h2][list][*][p]Fixed multiple floating map assets such as tables, chairs, and loungers that are now connected to the ground.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There were places in the stone mine POI where rain would fall through concrete structures. Those are now a thing of the past.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where the keycard was not visible when placed on the asphalt in some specific areas. It has been fixed now.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed the issue where interior walls of the Weapons Factory in Z1 sector would not be visible from a greater distance.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where it would be possible to float in the air at a specific building in the D1 sector in Gorica.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a rogue chair in sector B4 which wouldn’t allow you to rest on it. The chair fell in line and now you will be able to rest in it![/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a bug where players would spawn inside a wall after resting on a specific bed in the WW2 bunker after relogging. This has now been fixed, and the character will spawn safely inside the bunker without intersecting bunker geometry. Additionally, we fixed an issue where unnecessary collisions would occur at the roof entrance of certain WW2 bunkers.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where players could get inside a map border wall at a specific location.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed multiple level design issues like floating stones, trees, and other vegetation in multiple sectors.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a garage in A2 sector which shined bright in the dark despite having no light source. It is dark now as it should be.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Don’t like getting rained on while inside the building? We completely understand. So we fixed an issue where it would rain inside a specific building in D4.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Players can no longer jump through glass in Z1, as they used to be able to.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the item would incorrectly spawn above the box without proper alignment to the ground or supporting surface in the C0 Radiation Zone. Also fixed a misplaced spawner item clipping through the wall at C2.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where players were unable to place items on the ground in areas with wires on the floor. It has been fixed now.[/p][/*][/list][p] [/p][h2]WEAPONS[/h2][list][*][p]The Tommy Gun had a 50% lower fame requirement than other SMGs. It has now been set to the same as others.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where M82 scope and suppressor variants would inherit weapon camo or color and keep it after removal until attached to another weapon or after relogging. Now, these M82 attachment variants no longer inherit the weapon camo or color they are attached to.[/p][/*][*][p]While on the topic of scopes, there was an issue where the night vision scope would get destroyed when turned on. This one is a thing of the past now![/p][/*][*][p]We added the missing supported ammo type to the Improvised Minigun Turret crafting description. The recipe now correctly lists both 7.62x54mmR rounds and 7.62x39mm ammunition as compatible ammo types.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the ADS sight with a VH2 CT would become transparent while shooting.[/p][/*][*][p]You can no longer see the black border in ADS appearing around the scope lens on the M82 scope, Improvised Scope, P223 scope, SpektralDR scope, and ACOG scope.[/p][/*][*][p]Kar98k Bayonet trader price was lower than other bayonets, so it has been adjusted to match the prices of other bayonets.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where ammunition would randomly disappear from magazines, as reported by the community since the March 20th hotfix.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h2]OTHER[/h2][list][*][p]There was a bug where if you selected cash as a preferred payment method while on the service lift, it would give you back the money on your card when you sell something. That is no longer the case and it has been fixed.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue while playing in Sandbox mode where the character would get stuck in a wheel-holding animation after relogging back into the game.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a bug where clothes placed on the ground before it started raining would not get wet. Additionally, we have found that items that were wet and that were placed on the ground for too long would stop drying after a certain percentage, but would continue when the player would interact with the item. We’re pleased to inform you that both these issues were fixed and that both drying and getting wet in these instances works appropriately.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Also, there was a bug where players were unable to receive quest rewards if their mobile phone was turned off. Now, you receive the rewards regardless of whether the mobile phone is on or off.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where using the #spawnitem command for ammo would spawn a single bullet instead of a full stack. It is fixed now.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There were a lot of instances where the Military Mask item would clip with other face masks and it wouldn’t look good. Now, we have adjusted the morph for the Military Mask and clipping should no longer be an issue.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a misplaced puppet spawner somewhere in Ugljan, where puppets would spawn floating in the air. It is fixed now.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Apricot seed bag has now been removed completely and it does not spawn anymore.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Chests and wardrobes are now included in the base building destruction logs.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the quantity and weight of soy sauce were displayed incorrectly when added as an ingredient in the Cooking tab.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where puppets couldn’t vault through windows and open doors in Sandbox mode, even when server settings allowed it. This occurred at Sector B4 in a specific house in Preko and at B2 Seaside Gas Station. The issue has now been resolved. You have one more reason to be scared! While on the topic of vaulting and door-opening puppets, they are now able to do the same with the vaultable BB elements and BB doors.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the salt bag could not be fully unpacked at once. That’s no longer an issue, so no need to be salty about it.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Improved the description for the Santa Pants and Santa Hat clothing items,[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed inconsistent name capitalization for some Base Building elements in the storage menu. All Base Building storage items now use consistent capitalization. Additionally, we fixed minor grammatical errors in some of the chests' descriptions.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where Rag Gloves could be crafted using only one Rag Strip and would incorrectly yield 2 Rag Strips when cut.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Items in the radiation zone do not cause instant death of the player when picked up from the vicinity anymore.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]The Goat_Skull_Hat_01 doesn’t clip through Gas_Mask_01 anymore![/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was an issue where shovel kills would not count as blunt tool kills to eliminate puppets in the T1_AR_Kill_PuppetsBlunt quest. Now, this issue is resolved and shovel kills indeed count toward the blunt kill requirement for the quest.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Absinthe, Whiskey, Tequila, Majestic Bear Vodka, Kicmovaca, and Isopropyl alcohol do not weigh more after pouring them into another container like a Canteen, as was the case before. But you might feel like you gained some weight after drinking them…[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was issue where enemies would spawn in high-threat zones, such as the Police Station, directly in front of you while you were lockpicking, has been resolved. Enemies will no longer spawn within your line of sight while you are lockpicking.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Noticed how your character’s arms would go crazy while rowing on a Barba Boat or the Dinghy? Yeah, we know. Thankfully, the animation desynchronization issue that caused this atrocity has been detected and fixed, so there’s no way to view that nightmare fuel ever again.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We fixed an issue where car wrecks would not contain any loot in some garages.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]When driving the SideCar bike in first person at speed, it was possible to see through the character’s body model while looking backwards. Now the camera is properly aligned, and this issue does not occur anymore.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where engaging sentries from a distance would cause them to repeatedly call in hordes and dropships after being dealt with. Sentries now correctly call for reinforcements only once before entering cooldown.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the trader Sell tab UI did not visually include attached weapon items in the selected sale list, making it appear as though only the base weapon was being sold, even though attachments were correctly included in the final sale value. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Ever heard of floating chests? No, us neither. So we fixed an issue where some chests would remain levitating after the storage shelf beneath them was destroyed.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where armed NPCs could detect and shoot the player through the tower at the radio station in C2 even without having line of sight.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the female character’s legs would become invisible while wearing HH_Boots_01 with Pantyhose_01, Ghillie_Suit_Pants, and all variants of Shorts_Pants except Shorts_Pants_01_01 and Shorts_Pants_01_10. Additionally, fixed the bug where both female and male characters' legs would become invisible when wearing any variant of Short Pants.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where chests would lose their custom paint after leaving render range or when removed from a vehicle’s inventory.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where equipping Over The Knee Boots with any of the Twitch Drop pants items makes the legs invisible on the female character.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where it would be impossible to interact with the lamp upgrade blueprint after the server restart.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where melee-armed NPCs could deal damage to the player despite the server setting blocking it in custom zones.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where placing a flag near a bunker could interfere with Base Building mechanics, affecting puppet and loot spawns inside the bunker.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where vehicle tires would disappear when removing them while prone.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Pants that used to dry much more slowly than the rest of your equipment are now drying at a normal rate.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We removed the Microwave from the spawn item admin command because it would not spawn.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've renamed the Deluxe DLC, so the server setting caption "Enable Digital Deluxe Starter Pack" is now named "Enable Deluxe Survival Pack"[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]And that's a wrap when it comes to the April patch. We believe that this one will be much better than the last one and that it is more substantial. As you may be wondering, our next patch will drop in around a month so make sure to keep an eye out.[/p][p]Also, if you encountered any issue that might have popped up, we'd like to kindly ask you to report it either here on Steam via our [url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]Bug reports subforum[/url] or via our [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1020296375528869939"]Bug reports channel[/url] on our official Discord server! Our team will make sure to promptly react and fix any issues as soon as possible.[/p][p]You are also welcome to share any ideas, feedback, criticism - we're all ears![/p][p][/p][p]Until next time,[/p][p]The Gamepires team[/p]

items.title: April patch announcement
items.contents:
[p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e9eafdf310e13f34dd48c1a02c0924d82d1edfa4.jpg"][/img][/p][h3]Hey there, prisoners! We're here to announce this month's patch, which will roll out next week, on the 23rd of April, and will be packed with a variety of quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes, as well as various content and feature improvements![/h3][p][/p][p]Let's get this straight right off the bat - the last patch didn't really rock the world, especially with all the issues it brought. This time 'round, we're making sure that everything will be in working order and that we are delivering more value with the patch itself.[/p][p][/p][p][b]Oh and just to be clear - there will be NO WIPE for this update![/b][/p][p][/p][p]Without further ado, let's see what the team's been up to last month. Here are some of the biggest content additions and feature improvements that you can expect:
[/p][h3]SKS[/h3][p]This patch is definitely for the gun nuts, as we are introducing two new weapons in this patch! The first one is the SKS - the renowned Soviet-era semiautomatic carbine famous for its durability and versatility. Those who enjoy making precise and powerful shots from mid-range (and long range as well, with a little practice) will certainly enjoy playing with the SKS![/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1fe928c8b33173ff1698b4db01369562e6abb810.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]TRENCH GUN[/h3][p]The second weapon we are introducing with this patch is the notorious Trench gun - a weapon so devastating because of the sheer destruction it wrought with its slam-fire capabilities that there was even an attempt to ban it from the battlefields of WW1! Those that want to get up close and personal and settle their disputes quickly and efficiently will find the Trench gun a no-brainer![/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/802418d7ea6acd642499444eda01e143b7d1c39f.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]PICK UP ALL / DROP ALL[/h3][p]There were some functionalities that were omitted from the original Inventory rework that dropped in December last year, but now we are starting to fill in the gaps! From now on, you will be able to pick up and drop all your items with a single press of a button![/p][p][/p][p]Here, you can see the button to pick up all the items in the vicinity, also with fully functional filters working seamlessly with this function. This means that you can filter out specific item types, and the "pick up all" button will pick all the items of this type while ignoring the others.[/p][p] [/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e5ca900b9709a9404b6aad3e63c04e3c477ae55b.jpg"][/img][/p][p]This option to pick up all or drop all also works for lootable containers, meaning that with a single press of a button you can either store everything in your inventory or drop everything into your vicinity.[/p][p] [/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a55755b1a2f70547cdfc86cd36d8f31d1ec4069e.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/dcb047c2e7ac8a32da0acafc3f59ac34d344f4e8.jpg"][/img][/p][p] [/p][p][/p][h3]STACKABLE FOOD ITEMS AND COOKING INGREDIENTS[/h3][p]Additionally, those of you who are keen on cooking will find that ingredients, as well as food items, have now become stackable, meaning that it is much easier to organize your inventories![/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/0e96e3de5a15a86204418ede012e6977b4a4b4e0.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/01af3c3c9f91f92cdd252f12490f2122e8b58f9d.jpg"][/img] [/p][p][/p][p][/p][h3]LANDSCAPE LIGHTING IMPROVEMENT[/h3][p]These speak more for themselves! What better way to present these than with some before-and-after images? The first set shows how these changes affect the foliage, while the second and third sets show the differences in the bunkers and abandoned bunkers, respectively. We'll end this segment with a showcase on how the new lighting affects items such a weapons.[/p][p][/p][p]Before[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1c8c85d500f4975e296ed9f214ef0bf72758724b.jpg"][/img][/p][p]After[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/de50bd1f4f1728fbabc77bfb51ad805e92c1a5d9.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Bunker - Before[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/6671aa0c04e6ce388714346133dabf7f29eb2107.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Bunker - After[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/93bad58fca53dbdfe8f370270ca887e373943b0a.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Abandoned Bunker - Before[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7c1380415e4cd691a7672b966c881d542831ba76.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Abandoned bunker - After[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7246fe9f28a1ad97b5ad970f22109270a6fb7f0f.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Weapon - Before[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/18c1a4aa2e5f8c8d76cae9eb76a190229e5dd2d7.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Weapon - After[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/854f4e4cc4e30cb1c76e8aa3efd356e66eb12ccd.jpg"][/img] [/p][h3]...AND MORE![/h3][p]Secret bunker loot reworked, server setting descriptions including max and min values, informative text pop-ups for disabled interactions, more subtle vehicle wind sounds, and many more improvements and bug fixes await in the upcoming patch![/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]This is just a taste of what you can expect from the upcoming patch. We'll go in-depth on all the changes that will find their way into the game on release day. We'll be dropping some sneak peeks via our socials, so make sure to check those out![/p][p][/p][p]See you next week![/p][p]The Gamepires team[/p][p] [/p][p] [/p][p]
[/p]

items.title: SCUM - Community showcase
items.contents:
[h3]Greetings, Prisoners! Happy Tuesday! You know what time it is. With no further ado, let’s dive into this week’s community showcase.[/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d97d4a25fd9c3122c07f92a673a1311c0fa340ce.png[/img]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/420549b0d9cc43169343023742574eb07abd5e04.jpg[/img]

items.title: Hotfix - 1.2.2.2.109974
items.contents:
[p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a3c4fc8ecc3fe0331b1c56d97a4f5cc65dc3c942.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p]First of all, we'd like to apologize for the issues that popped up with last week's update. With this hotfix, our aim is to get them sorted out and that you finally enjoy the game![/p][p]Here's the list of issues we have cleared with this hotfix:[/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][list][*][p]First up - we fixed an issue where Chests and Wardrobes revert to their default name after renaming them and leaving their rendering range! Now, the custom names that you give to them persist.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where items would get infinitely irradiated, which made them impossible to decontaminate. Now, we've set a cap for item contamination, and items can now be decontaminated as intended.[/p][/*][*][p]We've also updated the server violation manager. [/p][/*][*][p]We fixed a server crash which occurred when double-clicking the grab button in the cooking UI while already having an item in hands.[/p][/*][*][p]We also fixed an issue where squad emblem flag, T-banner and camo net were completely black[/p][/*][*][p]We also found black borders on the POSP, Spektral, ACOG, and M82A1 scopes when equipped on the SVD, Mosin Nagant, VHS2, UMP45, VSS and AS Val. They're gone now. [/p][/*][*][p]We fixed an issue where reskinning of the base building items while playing in Sandbox would simply not work. [/p][/*][*][p]There was also an issue where the physical material of the ground was not set properly on several places in the B4 sector, which resulted in vehicle tires slowly falling through the ground. That's also fixed.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the DespawnLifetime timer on #SpawnArmedNPC command would not be saved on a server restart. Now, when the server restarts, the command will persist.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the issue where, in the vicinity UI while playing in Sandbox mode, the icon for the Improvised Wooden Chest would show an apple instead of the chest.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Premium Electric Ceiling Lamp skin could not be applied when upgrading from the Asian Electric Ceiling Lamp due to the upgrade blueprint not being properly exposed.[/p][/*][/list][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]As always, please let us know if you find anything else, either via our [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/444218299417624587"]Discord[/url] server for bug reports or via our dedicated [url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]bug reports[/url] Steam subforum.[/p][p][/p][p][/p]

items.title: SCUM - Hotfix 1.2.2.1.108938
items.contents:
[p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/35e8a8e1e9219628e14ae7657a1abb0ddf2ab639.jpg"][/img]
[/p][p]Hey there prisoners![/p][p]We're releasing a small, emergency hotfix which will fix some of the most egregious issues such as server crashes and stability issues.[/p][p]We're keeping an eye out for your reports and are diligently sifting through them. Another hotfix is arriving next week.[/p][p]We're sorry for any inconvenience these issues might have caused, we'll make sure to fix them ASAP.[/p][p]The SCUM team[/p]

items.title: March QoL patch available now!
items.contents:
[p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2baa94806a308da9d7c55c9dd2d5c13e678e406a.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Hey there prisoners,[/p][p][/p][p]Spring is the season of renewal, and we are more than happy to release another patch filled with a variety of quality of life improvements, bugfixes and other improvements![/p][p][/p][p]Without further ado - let's get started:[/p][p][/p][h3]SERVER SETTINGS AND ADMIN COMMANDS[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]Let's start off strong with a big one - much requested by server owners! As they were creating custom events using spawned armed NPCs, they would despawn when there were no players within the relevancy range. With this patch, puppets, armed NPCs and animals now have a DespawnLifetime option when being spawned by an admin command. From now on, for example, when you'll use the command [b]#SpawnArmedNPC BP_Drifter_Lvl_1 1 DespawnLifetime 20[/b], you will spawn a Lvl 1 Drifter that will not despawn if no players enter its relevancy range for 20 seconds. [/p][/*][*][p]Per popular demand, we've created a server setting where you can [b]set puppets to permanently limp[/b]! If you like slow zombies, this is the setting for you! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We're introducing some much requested changes to the building restrictions! Until now, we only had the 'Use Map Base Building Restrictions' server setting, which would regulate building bases near POIs. However, even with the above setting turned off, you would still receive the dreaded ''Too close to building'' message. [/p][p]Now, we've introduced a new server setting called ''[b]Building Proximity Restriction[/b]'' which will influence that ''too close to building'' restriction, which, when disabled, will practically allow you to build your bases wherever you want! It is important to note that the two settings are mutually dependent. This means that in order for the new setting to become available, you first need to set the original ''Use Map Base Building Restrictions'' to OFF.[/p][/*][*][p]There's a setting for PvE servers for disabling mines and traps which wasn't working correctly as the Traders still listed them as available for purchase. If you attempted to purchase mines or traps, they'd take your money but would not deliver the purchased goods. That's pretty low, even by prison island standards so we can't have any of that, so the option for purchasing these items has been completely removed if the server setting has been set that way.[/p][/*][*][p]We’ve received widespread reports from our PvE servers that some players are destroying other players’ vehicles by intentionally crashing into them with their own. This was possible regardless of the fact whether the vehicles were parked or in motion. To counteract this form of griefing, we will [b]temporarily disable all vehicle-to-vehicle damage on PvE servers[/b] until we manage to implement specific server settings for this situations.[/p][p] [/p][/*][/list][h3]CLOTHING[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]There was a bug where your character's legs would disappear when you had Boxer Briefs, Stockings and High Heel Boots equipped at the same time![/p][/*][*][p]Also, we had a bug where shirts equipped over Danny Trejo's Vest would not be visible. It is fixed now. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We know of stretch marks that can happen when people build too much much muscle mass in a short period of time, but this is ridiculous! There was a bug where wearing the sleeveless shirt while having a buff character would result in skin detaching from the male character and arms slightly detaching from the body on female characters! That nightmare fuel bug is thankfully also fixed! Also, while on the topic of buff character bugs, there was a weird occurrence where the biceps would shrink while wearing the undershirt. Imagine the horror a gym bro would feel if they saw this! Rest assured, it is no longer present in the game! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]I don't know why anyone on this Earth would simultaneously equip a Breathing Tube and a Christmas headband, but these two items were clipping through each other and now they don't. The same more or less goes for the Short pants and Leather mini skirt items.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]LOOT[/h3][list][*][p]We found that breaking a motorbike battery does not drop lead plates the same way breaking a car battery does. Now, the lead plates will drop, but the quantity is much smaller compared to a car battery.[/p][/*][*][p]You'd think that those pockets on the flannel shirt would hold something, but apparently that wasn't the case! We've found that the big-boned male civilian puppet wouldn't ever drop any loot. That's obviously not right so we made sure to fix that.[/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]ENCOUNTER MANAGER[/h3][list][*][p]Character respawn distances on small airfield POIs in sectors A4 and Z0 were significantly increased. We found that puppets could spawn as close as 15 meters from the player, which is obviously not good. Now, that distance for those POIs has been increased to 150 meters![/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]BASE BUILDING[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]It's not much of a shelf if you can't put anything on it! That's why we fixed the bug where you were unable to put a chest on the Eastern Standing Storage Shelf element. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]While on the subject of Eastern elements, there was an issue where both the Improvised and Metal version of Eastern chests have allowed you to put in more items than its weight capacity. Now, it's a thing of the past! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]No one likes shoddy furniture - us included! We found that the decay rate of the Wooden Double and Single Seat Sofas was faster than other base building elements. The decay rate has now been made consistent for all elements. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]You've heard about elf on a shelf? How about shelf on a shelf? As it turns out, there was a bug that allowed you to stack Storage shelves on top of each other, which, left unattended, would create some very unsavory possibilities for certain players. Rest assured, this was fixed. [/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c0382ccd348a1012a7839fa5930e7e9c4767a899.jpg"][/img][/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]While we're still at base building, we've fixed the incorrect destruction and particle effects for the Spiral staircase Lvl2 aka the one with the wooden boards. When you destroyed them, it showed the particles containing metal parts present in the Lvl 3 Spiral staircase. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Hope you didn't have Standing Storage Shelves placed next to Improvised Wardrobes. We found that if you destroyed the wardrobe, it would automatically destroy the storage shelf next to it. Now you can redecorate your base without fear. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]No one wants to sleep on the top bunk, but this is taking it to the extreme. We had a bug where whenever a player would want to rest on the top bunk of the Eastern Bunk Bed, it would just place the character on the bottom bunk. Fixed! On the same topic, if the Bunk Bed is directly beneath a roof, you were unable to rest on the top bunk. Also fixed! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've found that the Engineering XP gain was off when it came to upgrading base building elements to their Eastern variant. The numbers are now properly set. [/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]LEVEL DESIGN[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p] Don't know what the heck happened here, but I know it is fixed now!

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1238e2976c916bd1947c2f5735e9954dfd55877f.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1cfdf16bf48eeba80bf71de0da422d73bbeb49af.jpg"][/img][/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Also, close to the same location, we've fixed an issue where vehicle tires would clip through nearby concrete slabs.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][h3]EXPLOITS[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]Game dev wouldn't be fun if it weren't for exploiters! They found a way to get inside other people's bases by climbing up (read: clipping through) a ladder through the base foundation. Not anymore! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've found a very nasty bug where players that waited in their death screen when being killed would render their bodies unlootable. This is something that was heavily abused by some players in PvP, and is something that cannot be tolerated. This was fixed and will no longer be possible to abuse.[/p][/*][*][p]This one's interesting. We've found Sentry bots were farmed to death (especially the big ones) for the very valuable loot that they drop. We've also found that cheaters were also very much engaged in this activity, which led us to the conclusion that it is necessary to rebalance the loot Sentries drop. Here's a breakdown of what you will be able to loot from them from now on: [/p][p][b]Black sentry[/b]: C4 keypad, C4 circuit Board, BCU Lock, 4x 40x46 grenade launcher ammo, 2x Tear gas, 2x Flashbang, Keycard, Sentry Aiming Kit, 7.62x39 AP → random amount from 60 to 120, Laser Trigger, 50cal or minigun sentry weapon [/p][p][b]Yellow sentry[/b]: 50 BGM → random amount from 5 to 15, C4 Circuit Board, BCU Lock, 2x Portable Work Light, Laser detonator, Sentry aiming kit, Sentry 50 cal Rifle, Keycard [/p][p]You can see the clear omission of grenades, as they were one of the main reasons why farming them was a lucrative prospect.[/p][/*][*][p]You know how items automatically disappear when you climb up a ladder, and then reappear when you finish climbing? The items go to what we refer to as the 'magic pocket'. As it turns out, there was an issue where items that were put there would not drop to the ground if your character got killed while doing actions that utilize the 'magic pocket'. Some players used this to hide certain items from getting looted off of their bodies. Now, these items drop to the floor as it should be. [/p][/*][*][p]While on the topic of the magic pocket, we've fixed a bug where the item that was in the magic pocket would not be shown in the UI as it was in the 'hands' slot.[/p][p] [/p][/*][/list][h3]INVENTORY[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]Removing batteries from Night-vision Goggles while inside the chest would result in the batteries disappearing. Not anymore! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Leaky chests are good for nothing! We've found that taking the chest containing clothes into your hands and placing it on the floor again would result in the clothes getting wet in the rain despite being in the chest. Weird one, indeed, but it is fixed now. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Check this one out! When grabbing cooked food while squatting, the item does not go into the player’s hands as expected. Instead, it appears to remain on top of the grill grid or cooking surface where it was cooked. The item is not shown in the vicinity UI and can only be picked up by directly looking at it and pressing F. On the other hand, when the same action is performed while standing, the cooked food is correctly placed into the player’s hands. Now, it's a thing of the past and this was fixed. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Remember relogging? It turns out, if a crossbow has a bolt loaded and you relog, the loaded bolt disappears from the crossbow, causing ammo loss. This bug occurred regardless of where the crossbow is located, be it your hands, floor, inventory, vehicle storage, etc. The bug removes the bolt from the crossbow on relog and is not returned to inventory. This is definitely a more egregious one and we have fixed it.[/p][/*][*][p]Here's a weird one. It turns out that relogging and leaving the render range of the backpack, and then returning to it would cause the items inside to become invisible, even though the proper weight of the backpack would be shown. This certainly caused at least several heart attack-like experiences, but it is now a thing of the past.[/p][/*][*][p]We found that chests decay much faster inside the Barba's inventory than in other vehicles. For the same duration of time ( i.e. 2 hours) the chest was at 65% in the Barba while it stayed 100% in a land vehicle. In any case, the chest decay in Barba's inventory is now changed and is the same as in other vehicles.[/p][/*][*][p]We've also found a small, yet not at all insignificant bug where the chest sound effect played when the player logs in at the location where the chest was buried. It would be a tedious task to search for chests that way, but we have no intention to help anyone with such ''workarounds''.[/p][/*][*][p]There was an issue where moving items into vehicle inventory is slower than moving them out. We're pleased to say that this has now been fixed, and that vehicle inventory manipulation lag has been significantly reduced.[/p][/*][*][p]On the topic of vehicle manipulation, there was an issue where players were not able to take the chest out of a vehicle in Sandbox mode. Also fixed! [/p][p] [/p][/*][/list][h3]WEAPONS[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]We've fixed an animation bug where the hand and the camera would weirdly transition in the beginning and the end of the animation for loading bullets into the magazine for the [b]Hunter85 Carbon Wolf and AWP rifles[/b]. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was also an issue with the incorrect bullet render during the insert bullet loop animation. That's also taken care of. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've found that the [b]M1 scope[/b] had some unusual black area around the outer rim of the scope. Here's the before and after picture: [/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/db0567a250ca3cacd74a428ef946526345aa99bf.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/11f9a655cf954bb6c1d35f922e68291d592b8007.jpg"][/img][/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]When you would receive a double feed malfunction for the [b]SCAR L[/b], its iron sight would flash across the screen for a fraction of a second like some type of a jump scare. Not anymore! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've also found a strange animation glitch when checking ammo on a [b]Tommy gun drum[/b] [b]magazine[/b]. When you would enter that animation, a smaller mag would appear and enter the submachine gun. Glad to confirm that was taken care of. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a bug where your putting your knife in the knife sheath would basically render it useless as placing it there would disable interactions such as chopping, destroying, or cutting. Knife sheaths are for making your knives more accessible, not the opposite, so it has been thankfully fixed. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]There was a small visual bug where you could not see items such as pistols, knives or arrows inside other player holsters or quivers. That's also taken care of![/p][p][/p][/*][/list][h3]OTHER BUGFIXES AND QUALITY OF LIFE CHANGES[/h3][p][/p][list][*][p]There was some weird occurrence where you could not rest on random furniture in the world because of some changes to the way resting on the base building Bunk Bed element. Good riddance to that! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Rear lights for the Laika and Wolfswagen are now less opaque. They look nicer now. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've found that server logs went crazy when you would leave or end an event, resulting in unnecessary spam logs. There was something similar happening with leaving and returning to the render range of a backpack filled with items that were not visible, but it is now fixed as well.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We've fixed an obscure bug where the starter card would drop on the ground when respawning after turning on the setting to spawn on the ground. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Logging out, then logging back in can result in some unusual occurrences. We've found that relogging after being tied up leaves the character permanently tied up. Not anymore! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Hope we don't encounter ATMs such as these in real life! We've found that there was a bug where the money isn't added to the inventory when withdrawn from the banker, but it ends up on the floor.[/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We're adding an option to apply DLC cosmetics to existing base building elements. This means that you no longer have to craft new base building elements from scratch if you have the DLC. For example, if you already have an Improvised Single Seat Sofa, for a low cost of a single toolbox use you can just upgrade that element to its DLC counterpart. Fame and XP gain is nullified for this to prevent some of you wise guys from exploiting this system! [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]We also found a small bug where the usage and weight of [b]Soy Sauce, Vegetable Oil, Cans, and Red Ghoul Energy Drink[/b] are displayed incorrectly when added as an ingredient in the cooking tab. Now, we've adjusted the weight and maximum resource amounts and they are now expressed properly. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Once a player jumped on a tent surface, it produced an incorrect plastic-like sound. We have fixed it to sound more appropriate to the material it is made of. [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]You were unable to use the might of [b]Faceroll's Face Smasher[/b] to open canned foods. It is more than capable to handle a puny can of food, and now you can do so![/p][/*][/list][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]That's it when it comes to the March patch. We hope you'll enjoy some of these changes and improvements that we have brought. Our next patch will drop in around a month so make sure to keep an eye out.[/p][p]Also, if you encountered any issue that might have popped up, we'd like to kindly ask you to report it either here on Steam via our [url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]Bug reports subforum[/url] or via our [url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1020296375528869939"]Bug reports channel[/url] on our official Discord server! Our team will make sure to promptly react and fix any issues as soon as possible.[/p][p]You are also welcome to share any ideas, feedback, criticism - we're all ears![/p][p][/p][p]Until next time,[/p][p]The Gamepires team[/p]

items.title: QoL patch and wipe coming next week!
items.contents:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e9eafdf310e13f34dd48c1a02c0924d82d1edfa4.jpg[/img]

[h3] Hey there prisoners! We're here to announce a new patch that we'll roll out [b]next week, on the 19th of March[/b], which will be packed with a variety of quality-of-life improvements and bugfixes![/h3]

Although we have been a bit silent over the past couple of weeks, we were very much active behind the scenes, and the team was working hard to deliver something that will improve the overall experience of SCUM.

Without further ado, let's see what the team's been cooking and what they've got in store for you:

[h3]WHAT TO EXPECT?[/h3]

Almost all aspects of the game will receive at least some type of improvement or fix. Everything from base building tweaks, weapon fixes, admin command adjustments, graphical fixes, new server settings... you name it!

While a lot of cool new tweaks and improvements are coming, we acknowledge that we're missing some shiny new features that are the main source of excitement. Rest assured, we're working on those as well and we'll have one in a few months. In the meantime, we will be releasing smaller patches on a monthly basis such as the one we'll have next week. 

[h3]WIPE[/h3]

We are also announcing that along with the patch, we will also conduct a [b]partial wipe of all official servers[/b], which will take place on the same day - the 19th of March.

We wanted to give the community enough time to make the necessary preparations, as you will be able to sell all your stock for gold, which you will then be able to use again to repurchase some of the stock that you owned.

To point it out just in case one more time - gold will NOT be wiped and you will be able to claim it after the wipe. 

While unpopular to some, wipes are a necessity to keep servers running properly as they remove clutter such as unused bases and items from players who are no longer actively playing. They also make the servers fair and competitive for new players as everyone starts from the same position.

That being said, make sure to go out in a blaze of glory and paint the Island red before all your gear gets wiped!

As always, [b]partial wipes will NOT be enforced on private servers[/b], although we encourage server owners to do the same for the same reasons listed above. 

_______________________________

[h3]ADDRESSING THE ELEPHANT IN THE ROOM
[/h3]

We are aware of the radio silence from our side when it comes to the recent news of the Splash Damage acquisition and just wanted to use this opportunity to briefly refer to this.

There are a lot of moving parts and background processes happening right now. Lots of meetings on all sorts of topics are taking place, people and teams are getting to know each other, and there's all sorts of planning and decision-making that need to be conducted in order to create a crystal clear picture of our way forward.

Because we don't have all the information yet, we have decided to wait before making any official statements. As you're very much aware, things always tend to change if they are not locked in and we want to avoid coming out with anything that is not set in stone. The last thing everybody needs is additional confusion, and clarity and a clear picture are what the community needs most at this point.

That is why we'd like to kindly ask you for a bit of your patience on this matter. There's no need for any type of concern as we're still working on the game as you can see with the patch announcement, and we'll shed more light on this as soon as possible!

Thank you all and see you on the Island!

The Gamepires team

items.title: SCUM - Update on PlaySafe ID
items.contents:
[h3]Our partnership with PlaySafe ID over the past two months has started to show some promising results. Check it out![/h3]

[previewyoutube=iqA_tc7QqRE;full][/previewyoutube]

As anyone who's a had a bad run-in with cheaters can attest, their impact on the overall experience of the game could be devastating - especially in a game that is as hardcore as SCUM.

Combating this is no small feat, and with PlaySafe ID, we are slowly gaining the necessary edge we need to start meaningfully fight back against cheaters.

Two months ago, we've started to introduce PlaySafe ID to a handful of servers, and the results that we have show promise:

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/42c138f24efe421cf5b5806a4e72fda44e77d5d3.png[/img]

We've been quite pleased with the response that we've received, and we've seen a steady increase of interest for PlaySafe ID signups as players report significantly fewer issues with cheaters on servers. We're happy to see this collaboration going forward and because of this, we've decided to expand the number of servers that utilize PlaySafe ID which you can see in the list below:

[list]
[*]195.181.170.67:13058 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 – Europe[/b]
[*]195.181.170.67:13186 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #3 - Europe[/b]
[*]195.181.170.67:13314 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #4 - Europe[/b]
[*]98.142.3.91:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 – US East[/b]
[*]98.142.3.91:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #3 - US East[/b]
[*]172.240.69.131:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 – US West[/b]
[*]172.240.69.131:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #3 - US West[/b]
[*]170.23.43.245:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 – US Central[/b]
[*]170.23.43.245:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 - US Central[/b]
[*]78.111.102.152:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 – South America[/b]
[*]80.240.101.101:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 - South Africa[/b]
[*]80.240.101.101:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 - South Africa[/b]
[*]188.42.122.156:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 – Singapore[/b]
[*]188.42.122.156:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 - Singapore[/b]
[*]79.127.249.94:8194 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 – Russia[/b]
[*]79.127.249.94:8322 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 - Russia[/b]
[*]78.111.102.152:20012 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 – Brazil[/b]
[*]78.111.102.152:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 - Brazil[/b]
[*]51.161.198.209:20002 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #1 - Australia[/b]
[*]51.161.198.209:20102 - [b]SCUM Server Official PlaysafeID #2 - Australia[/b]
[/list]

Make no mistake, we're very much aware of the concerns that you have voiced with regards to signing up for PlaySafe ID. That is why we'd like to emphasize once more that:

[list]
[*] [b]PlaySafe ID signup is completely optional. You do not need it to play SCUM.[/b]
[*] [b]It will NOT be enforced and utilized on existing servers.[/b]
[/list]

If you have additional questions or would like to learn more about PlaySafe ID, you can watch our Q&A session on our YouTube channel:

[previewyoutube=Tr9o6NQO6LU;full][/previewyoutube]

Until next time!

-Fratman

items.title: SCUM - Hotfix 1.2.1.1.106289
items.contents:
[h3]Hello everyone, happy Tuesday! We got a hotfix coming your way, so check it out![/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/567f4a4b4e0e2a89f63e3b7c7949717a08cf625b.jpg[/img]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/990f83fb2e35684c070b0a2d90a019d6ec4bf79e.png[/img]
[list]
[*] Fixed the issues with some clothing items messing up the character model.
[*] Fixed the issue where arrows and bolts fired in SP would disappear mid-flight.
[*] Multiple level design fixes.
[*] Fixed the issue where it was not possible to build certain BB elements when the BB door was closed.
[*] Fixed the issue where compound bow ADS was offset.
[*] Fixed the issue where the main menu music was still playing when music volume was set to 0 in settings.
[*] Fixed the issue where you could log out with a chest in hands.
[*] Fixed the issue where the bank card was not usable at traders if in the hands slot.
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4373641fb5e5615c0881efee10559397f371d880.png[/img]
[list]
[*] Adjusted spawn rates of motorcycle helmets in shops.
[*] Returned unused items to spawn commands for private servers.
[/list]

items.title: SCUM - Lunar New year update 1.2.1.0.106058
items.contents:
[h3]Hello everyone! To celebrate the Lunar New Year, a new update! Some extra goodies, new cosmetic DLC, and a lot of fixes. Check it out![/h3][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/99110816ab7440102303ba85d8b18fca5bf0d3b6.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c48bb75e313c01b804d5465e9272d800962ca479.png"][/img]To start with the festivities, we have the new sword!

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/62d62e416f2fa632d830c1b815c623697ae33653.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/adb611d1f7d1c6ef88f2af148cd63f966a9266fe.jpg"][/img]The Zhan Ma Dao sword is a two-handed beast that will make a statement and cleave your enemies clean. Made for cutting cavalry, you can imagine what it can do to your enemies. Not only that, but also looking stylish on your back with its special scabbard when carried on the island, you are sure to be the envy of others carrying it.

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ad67fbbe3262f32ba8601dc0142971797ecbafd4.png"][/img]Next up, we have a brand new female model for your character creation!

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/186fd7d7cafc4e8c8cb902473b261cce9b068ec7.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/9b677b72ac520ae21031ebb642a624c2e1b01e34.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/45b14d5ac3479fbfef168bb00d768789571e4ebe.jpg"][/img]And as you can see, a brand new style of clothes is available to accompany the new character.

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/6f92ea000c21ebe8581b03f6ac62d7baf366d517.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/7b40f0ecc983f8e8ee3f6d1229288c77871a922e.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/6038949a556d00c9eff98e21e503a295026fabbd.png"][/img]There is a huge pass of item decay rebalance. We reviewed your feedback and took another look at the numbers, and we saw that there was a lot we could do here. So we did a bit of rebalancing of all items and how they decay. Until now, for the majority of items, there has been a flat 1.4% per day decay rate on items. For clarity's sake, all values will be expressed per day.

[/p][table colwidth=",,"][tr][th][p]Category[/p][/th][th][p]Old Decay % per Day[/p][/th][th][p]New Decay % per Day [/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p]FISH[/p][/td][td][p]14[/p][/td][td][p]12.4 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]ANIMAL PARTS[/p][/td][td][p]60[/p][/td][td][p]10.2 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]PRISONER[/p][/td][td][p]1.4[/p][/td][td][p]4 [/p][/td][/tr][/table][p]Fish and animal products had their values decreased to better represent how it would decay, human and puppet flesh however got an increase for the same reason.

[/p][table colwidth=",,"][tr][th][p]Category[/p][/th][th][p]Old Decay % per Day[/p][/th][th][p]New Decay % per Day [/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p]WOODEN MATERIAL[/p][/td][td][p]1.4[/p][/td][td][p]2.2 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]BONE[/p][/td][td][p]1.4[/p][/td][td][p]2 [/p][/td][/tr][/table][p]
Wooden materials like planks, logs etc and bones also saw an increase in decay.

[/p][table colwidth=",,"][tr][th][p]Category[/p][/th][th][p]Old Decay % per Day[/p][/th][th][p]New Decay % per Day [/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p]PET BOTTLE[/p][/td][td][p]10[/p][/td][td][p]0.4 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]PACKAGE[/p][/td][td][p]1.4[/p][/td][td][p]0.4 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]MISC[/p][/td][td][p]1.4[/p][/td][td][p]1.2 [/p][/td][/tr][/table][p]
Plastic materials had their decay rate reduced however, as we are all reminded plastic is not biodegradable.

[/p][table colwidth=",,"][tr][th][p]Category[/p][/th][th][p]Old Decay % per Day[/p][/th][th][p]New Decay % per Day [/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p]IN CONTAINER (AMMOBOX)[/p][/td][td][p]7[/p][/td][td][p]0.6 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]PURE STACK[/p][/td][td][p]7[/p][/td][td][p]1.2 [/p][/td][/tr][tr][td][p]CRAFTED[/p][/td][td][p]7[/p][/td][td][p]2.6 [/p][/td][/tr][/table][p]
