[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ba4d02c4e82b933e7f288c27469aed8ff7a48e5c.png"][/img]Introducing the SCUM Eastern Furniture Pack! Inspired by the style of the Far East, these new furniture skins provide an iconic look to your base interior. Sofas, shelves, lights, and so much more:

[dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4369750/SCUM_Eastern_Furniture_Pack/"][/dynamiclink]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4381cb5bca34cc44fe5cfda9c67d0658b47fddd0.jpg"][/img]
Included are 29 new skins for base-building elements:
[/p][list][*][p] Kitchen counter skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Stove skin.
[/p][/*][*][p] Bed skin.
[/p][/*][*][p] Table skin.
[/p][/*][*][p] Sofa skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Chair skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Gas and electric light skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] All 3 chest variation skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Shelf storage skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Wardrobe skins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Rug skin.
[/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2ce4a45fee504d7f539840198ac269bb151385b9.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/61b54f676c2736ed9ea81c5441d6d7355f7d3c66.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ad18ebe5f278a3f4615a00cf01fab2ecfa2263b5.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/5ea758f6cfd7f065d4c9e24ae960e2e2c3031836.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/81f8fcd90e46ea8297561db84a5470099a3f150b.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/efd33015589671ec5db1f3cf296a3657da9b55f0.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/6576dfbf3d935848638cdc10e0d505a4b320b207.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/400337539199021342e5312e36c1e0689eb07d9e.jpg"][/img][/p][previewyoutube="VEoS9mVFvYM;full"][/previewyoutube][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/990f83fb2e35684c070b0a2d90a019d6ec4bf79e.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p] Fixed the issue where weapons would not get wet when in back holsters or in hands.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the "Wash all" action would consume all water from wells.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the Squad emblem banner and wall flag could only be destroyed with an axe item.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the brick and cement window wall BB element could be destroyed by sharp tools.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the air pump could not be repaired.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where mobile phones could not be repaired.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where bottle weight would reset on relog.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the sidecar bike could not reverse.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where Laika would not stabilize itself fast enough on end service action.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where driving over certain terrain would cause too much damage to vehicles.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where it was possible to place floating flags.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where unusable items could be spawned through commands.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where entering combat mode while in a vehicle would recentre the view.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the Sidecar bike weapon station would sometimes point in the wrong direction.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the Sidecar bike engine blueprint would appear offset on the service lift.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue with animations when switching seats in the back of the Rager.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where, on knockout, players would keep their items in their hands.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where puppets would sometimes snap a few meters after being hit by a thrown item.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where you needed all 3 wheels to push the Sidecar bike; only 2 are now required.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where players would lose items at traders if the trader depot was full.
[/p][/*][*][p] Multiple fixes and adjustments on the Custom Zone Settings menu to account for other languages.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issues with Rager damage regions, where bumpers and rear doors would ignore damage and damage would be applied to the chassis directly.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the Dinghy would not have enough buoyancy and would sink when driving upstream.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where multiple player corpses could be spammed, thus exploiting items.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where some items would not spawn on the island.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where stackable items' values would not properly show in economy logs.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where all garden plants would face the same direction on relog.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where BB gardens could cause a crash.
[/p][/*][*][p] Multiple fixes on incorrect icons on trader menus.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where wooden cabin doors could not be locked.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where swapping wheels from improvised to regular on vehicles would break the vehicle handling completely.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where players climbing ledges would produce footstep sounds.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where some BB elements were only repairable through flag interaction.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where rocket turrets attacking sentries would crash the server.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where switching storage items quickly would show unwarranted stats on the items.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where some BB elements, such as barbed wire walls, would not damage players when they should.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where pushing Sidecar bikes would consume no stamina.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where flamethrower damage was not impacted by Custom zone settings.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where vehicle delt damage was not impacted by Custom zone settings.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where other BB elements could not be placed if there was a rug already placed.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where a vehicle parked too close to traders would sometimes automatically be selected for trade, making players unknowingly sell their vehicles.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where throw damage was not enabled in Samobor city.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where passing out while in a plane would cause players to be stuck under the map.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the "Allow skill gain in safe zones" server setting was disabled, still allowed XP gain.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where specific puppets would drop the wrong items.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where activating some admin commands in the game would transfer the effect to other servers.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the censor effect would censor nothing while swimming.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where the Thompson submachine gun would not have a magazine in events.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where holding a rifle while in a plane would have the rifle clip through everything.
[/p][/*][*][p] Fixed the issue where BCU locks would disconnect when entered virualized state.
[/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4373641fb5e5615c0881efee10559397f371d880.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p] Custom Zones can no longer remain unnamed; if the name field is left empty, a name will be generated.
[/p][/*][*][p] Reduced the spawn chance of Air pumps.
[/p][/*][*][p] Reduced decay rate for fuses.
[/p][/*][*][p] Updated several ammunition items for better consistency.
[/p][/*][*][p] Increased Sidecar bike wheel grip.
[/p][/*][*][p] Adjusted service prices for some vehicles.
[/p][/*][*][p] Weapon attachments already attached to weapons can no longer be placed into quest bins.
[/p][/*][*][p] Experience points for weapons are now awarded to weapon kills on puppets in SP.
[/p][/*][*][p] Destroyed Dinghy can no longer be deflated.
[/p][/*][*][p] You can now drag and drop items into vehicle expansion tabs to quickly place the item in the expansion space.
[/p][/*][*][p] Reduced damage dealt by crossbow NPCs in abandoned bunkers.
[/p][/*][*][p] Added new server setting that allows players not colide with eachother.
[/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3a7f29f23711045a457d1f768c9fd832e4d774b4.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p] Added a Custom zone setting that enables/disables players from placing down blueprints in the zone area.
[/p][/*][/list]

items.title: SCUM - Development update
items.contents:
[h3]Hello everyone, happy Monday! Get the week off with another development update! Check it out![/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e51cf44b82ee57c024799cb7969eb2b52569577b.png[/img]

In a bit of a different format, and we will get into that. 

As you already know, this year we are putting our main efforts into resolving old issues and finishing reworks that have been waiting for a while now. With that, the development updates, as you have also already noticed and pointed out, have been becoming more or less a copy-paste week in week out as those reworks take time. So we are changing how Dev update works.

First change is that there will no longer be weekly updates. Rather, we are posting them as we have info to share with you, and at least once a month to at least keep you posted that we are here. Fort today, we are gonna start a conversation on some popular topics that have been coming up.

First one being the roadmap and where it is: The answer is not available to be seen in public yet. As we still have finishing details to go over on how, when, and what can be done on the calendar, we do not want to put information out there that might be different in a week. As for why it is taking a bit longer to have the details done and ready, well, that is something we hope we can share with you soon.

Next up, we have the PTE. No, we have not forgotten about it. We were collecting the feedback and data we got from it and are making adjustments before we put out another round of testing.

Here is what we have gathered so far:

Loot changes are a step in the right direction; that much is clear. From the feedback gathered, the biggest issue right now is that there is too much military loot on PTE, and still not enough general loot. So we are balancing it out a bit more, raising overall loot a bit while also slightly reducing military loot to have it balanced. Locked lockers having a 100% drop is something we see everyone likes, so that will remain unchanged. 

As for trader changes, we see an overwhelmingly positive reception to it, but also some skepticism. Solo players and low population are concerned that traders will then become useless in their environment, and we can see that point. We are looking into a solution for those cases, so be assured that nothing will be enforced until we have something on that front. 

The least amount of feedback was given on the vehicle front, so we are keeping it as is for now. In the future, though, even vehicle spawners will be adjusted accordingly as soon as we can free up people who can set it up, who are now working on those long-awaited features, as those will not be delayed anymore.

So we will keep you posted when the new changes hit the PTE, and cannot wait to hear from you guys again to make sure looting on SCUM is at its best possible state.

Until next time, 

Beda.

[h3]Good day Prisoners! We’re back with our weekly Community showcase. Get comfy and check out what we have in store for you this time. Let’s go![/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d97d4a25fd9c3122c07f92a673a1311c0fa340ce.png[/img]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/79d21145e05d67cfba75b3059c5fde8981a5c0d6.jpg[/img]
[i]The hunting season has begun.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658487952]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/832c819a7369c8a64be4f2343c22816702f81f3a.jpg[/img]
[i]Well, that’s one way to fertilize the soil.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658353891]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/bb0d191d1a5b9923ed2140c3def358408a177f1f.jpg[/img]
[i]You and the homie the morning after the night out reconsidering your choices.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658199540]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3563ef39f88eae48ad417ff985fb987d95a88a77.jpg[/img]
[i]It’s getting hot in here, so take off all your clothes![/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658131291]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/82c7fee48b7b668b57432069ff34a1a4b93ae775.jpg[/img]
[i]When your boss forgets to order a porta-potty for the construction site.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658800081]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/bd4b565fbd25e487d07c504afc043a76a28b0600.jpg[/img]
[i]Yeah I’m free, free falling.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658721676]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/df6071b5c3031943688628c6608cfd11d1a062ea.jpg[/img]
[i]Amber Heard-ed the teammate's bed.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658649033]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/cc56094cdadbdaed2a0f7c97cd797ae20f885301.jpg[/img]
[i]Proudly standing in front of her last kill.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3659013116]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/f79a43e89fd8534a96f2c436c7cc0aeb459d2089.jpg[/img]
[i]When your dad takes you and the bro fishing.[/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3658672939]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/22ec164e0834186e3c4406981c2d1ae341af6a3d.jpg[/img]
[i]We’ll never stop posting pretty sunset pics! [/i]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3659127349]Link to original[/url]
[/list]

_____

In our YouTube video content creators this week we have ->

Watch [b]jackfrags[/b] playing SCUM for the first time with his homies and eating grasshoppers.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=goteY5Rw410

Next up is [b]ScumDumpster[/b] with their 15th ScumDumpster Dirt Bike Death Race that will take place on February 6th. Check out their official Discord channel for more info. Big up for our ScumDumpster bois out there! 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tkhN_PemX4Y

As we said earlier, the hunting season has begun so check out [b]Sophie[/b] and her Overkill Hunt and learn a thing or two about hunting! 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yjSjP6YIZTc

[b]KillaMikeZ2693[/b] is walking us through the PvE element of SCUM and highlighting what new players might find useful.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n672ANFZRCw

_____

Twitch content creators last week brought us ->

[url=https://www.twitch.tv/ryleyusescaffiene/clip/PiliableStrongNikudonPlanking-xJ1IJkrzoMakyQCI]Pro landing by [b]ryleyusescaffiene[/b]. [/url]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/fee53318692ff643abbfa9e86e7e6a9b20e2c00b.jpg[/img]

[url=https://www.twitch.tv/scum_noob/clip/RichFilthyLorisSaltBae-osFY09fMS8MBmucn][b]scum_noob[/b] finding out about karma. [/url]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/2cdb027a49a973c4e0a6d9c5b7a95d20f6588952.jpg[/img]

[url=https://www.twitch.tv/raykitgames/clip/ColdbloodedSmellyOrcaMrDestructoid-HqwwwpSJMaVopmNv][b]RayKitGames[/b] showcasing his stunt skills. [/url]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/104bbf4d85b4c17c7edca0809b6f6c91724f8372.jpg[/img]

[url=https://www.twitch.tv/isumo1992i/clip/EasyLuckyZucchiniMVGame-6H7c7oT7lLFV_4s7][b]isumo1992i[/b] with who knows how many hours of looting down the drain - almost literally. [/url]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4067edd401b9cdc750b0122a2498fba97f2f9879.jpg[/img]

[url=https://www.twitch.tv/shiftyhandz/clip/VenomousAffluentPonyFUNgineer-eqFvokGyEVTkT5Uf][b]shiftyhandz[/b] is quick on his hands, but not quick enough when the horde comes running! [/url]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3296e2df42457a81edde924fd364d97467e45d52.jpg[/img]

[url=https://www.twitch.tv/eule_zockt/clip/AntsyBeautifulWheelWutFace-n5oJRi53RESg7SQC]C'mon [b]Eule_zockt[/b], it's not that boring.[/url]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/e7aa1537205a14b7b839b88f7d224dc045eb423c.jpg[/img]

_____

That's it for today, see you all next week!

Somke

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/a879fa83dc1996fd88888e6d8d505b5292af6fed.png[/img]

[b][url=https://www.twitch.tv/pfarrerskind/clip/AmorphousTubularLardPeanutButterJellyTime-C2R1HjPD7BFZhe-o]Pfarrerskind showcasing great musical skills.[/url][/b]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/35089080f9667ac8d048678e003719afda69da86.png[/img]

[b][url=https://www.twitch.tv/game_kamerad/clip/EnthusiasticAverageAnteaterPlanking-_WVoOMez0HOqqz1I]game_kamerad's drink almost ended up all over his entire setup.[/url][/b]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/904943e613bb5912a6bb5dd123dd573acf2992a5.png[/img]

_____

[h3]We’re also featuring content creators from YouTube →[/h3]

Here’s a video of [b]Davo[/b] doing some crazy stuff with the NPCs on his modded server.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kkAW8Z0EU2Q

Next up, we have [b]Torak[/b] with an interesting task he set out for himself, all while playing on a server protected by PlaySafe ID!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dHzV4XKf1rQ

Something went terribly wrong for [b]MrCandy![/b] We have our guesses, but it’s best that you check out for yourself!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zOmoJjayFlo

[b]Dr. Grant[/b] posted a hilarious video of baiting unsuspecting players with a seemingly abandoned car.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jY7dJYv58fQ

To top things off with our YouTube section, here’s [b]REDRUM THE GAMER[/b] playing on a fully populated server that accommodates 120 players!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8Di_OVxZtP4

_____

That's about it for this week, see you next!

Somke

items.title: SCUM - Hotfix 1.2.0.5.104391
items.contents:
[h3]Hello everyone, splitting the middle of the week with another small hotfix regarding logging and stuff, check it out![/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/35e8a8e1e9219628e14ae7657a1abb0ddf2ab639.jpg[/img]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4373641fb5e5615c0881efee10559397f371d880.png[/img]
[list]
[*] Trap, throwable, and plantable item damage is now logged in the base_building_destruction log
[*] Disabled telemetry temporarily due to system migration.
[*] Updated violation logs tracking.

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3a7f29f23711045a457d1f768c9fd832e4d774b4.png[/img]
[list]
[*] Implemented a server setting that disables loot puppet spawning.
[*] Implemented a server setting that disables loot puppet horde spawning.
[/list]

Both settings can be located under World->NPC

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8wrZdgy44VM

Finally, take a loot at [b]Skab[/b] who just recently discovered SCUM and is curiously exploring everything the island has to offer. We wish you luck!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bbtm49TO2Hk


Also an announcement! Due to popular demand we have decided to open up some new PLaysafe servers, so if you are interested go check them out! As always we will monitor the situation and add more if needed:

items.title: SCUM - Hotfix 1.2.0.4.104237
items.contents:
[h3]Hello everyone, happy Monday! Start the week with yet another hotfix, check it out! ->[/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4871a20bb107782cb3f7bee3a925bf256b66dd93.jpg[/img]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/990f83fb2e35684c070b0a2d90a019d6ec4bf79e.png[/img]
[list]
[*] Fixed the issue where puppets shot by a partially drawn bow would get stunned and then snap right next to the player.
[*] Fixed the issue where, in some cases, dragging a chest out of inventory would drop it on top of buildings when no space is available.
[*] Fixed the issue where purchasing a larger quantity of items from the traders would not provide all of the items, even though funds were spent
[*] Fixed the issue where you could sit with a chest in your hands.
[*] Fixed the issue where players would not drop items in their hands when knocked out.
[/list]

items.title: SCUM - Hotfix 1.2.0.3.104129
items.contents:
[h3]What's up, prisoners! Hope Thursday treating you well! Here's a small hotfix to brighten up your day.[/h3][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1dc60331592f612fc764145404aff5e207a954c4.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/990f83fb2e35684c070b0a2d90a019d6ec4bf79e.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where the projectile log would be filled with spam logs.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4373641fb5e5615c0881efee10559397f371d880.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p]Improved performance on PlaySafe ID servers[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted collision for concrete fences[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]As always, if something pops up and you've found that something slipped through the cracks, make sure to let us know via: [/p][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]SCUM bug reports[/url] [/p][p][url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1020296375528869939"]Discord bug reports[/url] [/p][p][/p][p]Fratman[/p]

items.title: SCUM - Community showcase
items.contents:
[h3]Hello everyone! Happy Wednesday! Yesterday we released a long-awaited Hotfix, and another smaller one is already on the way. While you’re waiting, here’s another Community Showcase. Let’s go! [/h3][p]

[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/d97d4a25fd9c3122c07f92a673a1311c0fa340ce.png"][/img]
[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/c03df130f625f4de94bbfd723a8a94a300131979.jpg"][/img] [i]Multiple fractured bones, doctor, the patient is just un_lucky4.[/i][/p][p][/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3645371929"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/ac84e401a44b8da240497bf36ca014ddc677a759.jpg"][/img][i]The team is getting ready and cozy for a long winter.[/i]
[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3645261214"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/586bd6220b8dbcbcb4f2b45ae306a3f8c01dbfae.jpg"][/img][i]Couples who hunt together, stay together.[/i]
[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3645158170"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/486cc462452b4fd91dcc7f90335c0d5ee7d57bc8.jpg"][/img][i]This is not what they meant by fast food.[/i]
[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3645127291"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/788a14efa45b9eccea9253827fbacf5869059b31.jpg"][/img][i]The vibe is simply immaculate.[/i]
[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3645012584"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/88525ce901cafd2daab07708b3981e4bfc19b2e3.jpg"][/img][i]Hi, I’m crystalklar14712, welcome to SCUM![/i]
[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3644955532"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/b66fb576dec1a37f6a4548c42868e57a1bef5687.jpg"][/img][i]This, for one, is an envy-worthy garage.[/i]
[/p][list][*][p][url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3644375780"]Link to original[/url][/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/8b692f6740ceff29cfed1565beefb634fa4cac63.jpg"][/img][i]Chasing the sunset in the faithful Dinghy.[/i]

That is all, folks. See you all next week!

Somke

items.title: SCUM - Hotfix 1.2.0.2.104004
items.contents:
[h3]What's up, prisoners! Now that we're all returned fresh from our holidays, we're kicking this January off and starting strong with a much-anticipated hotfix![/h3][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/1dc60331592f612fc764145404aff5e207a954c4.jpg"][/img][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/990f83fb2e35684c070b0a2d90a019d6ec4bf79e.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p]Fixed an issue where movement and interactions would be frozen if the character interacted with a trader while jumping.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the game would crash when dragging a magazine into another magazine's attachment slot.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the server would hang when using an admin command to spawn large inventory full of items with large number of stacks.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the L Support Frame Metal was incorrectly named in the context menu.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Improvised Workbench could not be manually repaired.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where buried chests could not be observed in drone mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where base building blueprints would disappear after a server restart.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a light cutout in the character creation menu background. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where players were unable to craft electrical lamps using Sidecar Bike lamps. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Lamp BB elements displayed a weight of 1.0 g. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where AT4 ammo would get refiled after a relog. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where items would sometimes disappear after being dropped. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the wetness indicator was not displayed for the Tomahawks and Military Shovel items. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the character would sometimes not be able to take anything into hands. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where items inside the character's inventory would decay while character is offline. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where cooking utilities were clipping through the improvised oven when placed on it. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where items dropped in certain areas would disappear or teleport to a different location. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where an empty water bottle would return to the spot it was thrown from. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where characters hit by thrown weapons took damage without any accompanying visual impact or feedback. [/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the Hazmat and Vintage Hazmat suits would lose too much durability over time.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed Weapon_Parts_SCAR_DMR not being visible in the vicinity.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the game would crash when taking ammo out of the chest.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where exiting Sandbox via "Quit Game" caused items in gun/knife sheaths to drop to the ground.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where TAB menu cannot be accessed while holding an empty Improvised Flamethrower.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the egg food item could not be found at the bartender trader unless searched via the search bar.[/p][/*][*][p]Various level design fixes, which should result in better collisions and subsequently, better vehicle handling over rugged terrain. [/p][/*][/list][p]
[img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/4373641fb5e5615c0881efee10559397f371d880.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted the displayed weight of the City Bike and Mountain Bike to 25 kg. [/p][/*][*][p]Reduced the nutritional value of seeds by lowering their weight. [/p][/*][*][p]Items can no longer be moved or placed through vehicles to prevent them from disappearing. They can now be placed either on the vehicle or next to it. [/p][/*][*][p]Updated the Flare gun description for improved clarity.[/p][/*][*][p]Decreased Sidecar Bike push forces and max speeds.[/p][/*][*][p]Reduced decay rate of non-food items.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed minor clarity and grammatical errors in the Aviation skill description.[/p][/*][*][p]Increased fridge inventory size from 15x15 to 16x16.[/p][/*][*][p]Kunai knife should now be visible in the vicinity panel when lodged inside base buildings elements.[/p][/*][*][p]Player username is now also logged in the base building destruction log.[/p][/*][*][p]Added logs for base building destruction in which the last ten hits above 20 damage to a destroyed base building element are logged, along with the UserlD of the instigator, the used weapon, and the possible damage. [/p][/*][*][p]Vehicle destruction log now shows the deflating and inflating of the Dinghy.[/p][/*][*][p]Added graphics setting for screen space reflection quality.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted the default item decay damage multiplier. More info in the additional notes. [/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/27012442/3a7f29f23711045a457d1f768c9fd832e4d774b4.png"][/img][/p][list][*][p][b]scum.BaseBuildingDestructionLogDamageThreshold[/b] - With this setting, players can change the damage threshold for the base building destruction log, which outputs the last 10 instances of damage for each destroyed base building element. Only damage instances that would make more or the same damage as the threshold are logged. The values for this setting are the following:

Minimum value - 0
Default value - 20
Maximum value - 999[/p][/*][/list][hr][/hr][p][/p][p][b]ADDITIONAL NOTES ON ITEM DECAY[/b][/p][p]We’ve updated the default item decay damage multiplier where the value of 1.0 will now corresponds to what the 0.2 multiplier used to do. 

[b]Previously: A value of 1.0 caused roughly 7.5% decay per 24 hours.
Now: A value of 1.0 causes roughly 1.4% decay per 24 hours.[/b] 

Having said that, we’ll be updating official servers from 0.2 → 1.0. We also recommend that private server owners who have adjusted this setting review their configurations and consider updating them accordingly.[/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p]
As always, if something pops up and you've found that something slipped through the cracks, make sure to let us know via:

[url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/513710/discussions/6/"]SCUM bug reports[/url]
[url="https://discord.com/channels/228656196247093248/1020296375528869939"]Discord bug reports[/url]

Fratman[/p]
